1000610012.english: The agent is heading to the theme park.

1000610013.english: May the protection of light be with you.

1000610015.english: Huh? What? Are you still fighting?

1000610016.english: Seriously~ It's been a long time since I've felt this blocked up.
1000610016.korean: 정말~ 이렇게 꽉 막힌 기분은 정말 오랜만에 느껴보네요.

1000610017.english: Do you often hear people around you say you're stubborn?
1000610017.korean: 혹시 주변에서 고집불통이라는 소리 자주 듣지 않나요?

1000610018.english: I'm sure my skin would have been damaged a lot because of you in the old days.
1000610018.korean: 구 시대의 저는 당신 때문에 피부가 많이 상했을 게 분명해요.

1000610019.english: Commander-in-Chief, nothing can be achieved with such accusations.
1000610019.korean: 총사대장. 그런 비난으로는 아무것도 얻을 수 없습니다.

1000610020.english: Stop leading Your Majesty there now.
1000610020.korean: 지금이라도 폐하를 그곳으로 이끄는 것을 멈추세요.

1000610021.english: Ah~ You've been saying the same thing for hours... If you haven't heard that yet, let me tell you. You stubborn bastard!
1000610021.korean: 아~ 몇 시간 째 똑같은 말만... 아직 그런 소리 못 들으셨으면 제가 해 드리죠. 이 고집불통!

1000610022.english: There's absolutely nothing cute about you! Take a page out of those kids' book. If you keep acting so stuffy, you'll never earn His Majesty's love...
1000610022.korean: 귀여운 점이라곤 정말 하나도 없군요! 저기 아가들을 본받도록 하세요. 그렇게 답답하게 굴다간 폐하의 사랑을 받지...

1000610024.english: Oh my, oh my... This was the right answer! What is it, you definitely have a cute side, baby.
1000610024.korean: 어머어머어머... 이쪽이 정답이었군요! 뭐에요, 귀여운 면도 확실히 있잖아요, 아가.

1000610025.english: ...Please focus on your duties of assisting His Majesty.
1000610025.korean: ... 폐, 폐하를 보좌하는 임무에 집중해 주세요.

1000610027.english: Foot, you were just saying you were going to stop us, and now you want us to focus on the mission?
1000610027.korean: 풋, 조금 전까지는 저희를 막겠다고 했으면서 이제는 임무에 집중하라고요?

1000610029.english: Hehe, it's really cute how your face turns bright red and you're flustered. I guess you still don't have enough data?
1000610029.korean: 후훗, 얼굴이 새빨개져서 당황하는 모습이 정말 귀엽네요. 역시 아직 데이터가 부족한가보죠?

1000610030.english: Take it easy, Charlotte. If you insult me ​​any further...
1000610030.korean: 적당히 하세요, 샬럿 총사. 이, 이 이상 저를 모욕하시면...

1000610032.english: Your Majesty, you have come to see me!

1000610034.english: - Armand's embarrassed face is visible beyond the sight of Fenrir and Charlotte running towards her with great momentum and embracing her.
1000610034.korean: - 엄청난 기세로 달려와 품에 안기는 펜리르와 샬럿의 모습 너머로 아르망의 당황스러운 얼굴이 보인다.

1000610035.english: - It turned out to be an unintentional peeking, but... there was an unexpected harvest.
1000610035.korean: - 본의아니게 엿본 것처럼 되어버렸지만... 의외의 수확이 있었군.

1000610036.english: - I have a feeling that what I just saw is Armand's real face.
1000610036.korean: - 방금 본 모습이 아르망의 진짜 얼굴이라는 생각이 든다.

1000610037.english: Hoohoo, Your Majesty? I've cleared the way for you. See?
1000610037.korean: 우후후, 폐하? 제가 폐하를 위해 오시는 길을 말끔히 청소해 두었답니다. 보셨나요?

1000610040.english: - Armand seemed shocked by Charlotte's coquettish behavior as she hugged her.
1000610040.korean: - 아르망은 내게 안기며 아양을 부리는 샬럿의 모습에 충격을 받은 것 같았다.

1000610042.english: ...Yes, Your Majesty. Data on Your Majesty is particularly scarce, but...
1000610042.korean: ...네, 폐하. 폐하에 대한 데이터는 특히 더 부족하지만...

1000610043.english: - Armand's face returned to its stern expression.
1000610043.korean: - 아르망은 어느새 다시 엄격한 얼굴로 돌아왔다.

1000610044.english: But I can't help but say the same thing.
1000610044.korean: 그렇지만 저는 또 같은 말을 할 수 밖에 없습니다.

1000610046.english: - I can see the large iron gate of the theme park in the distance.
1000610046.korean: - 저 멀리 테마 파크의 커다란 철문이 보인다.

1000610047.english: - Although it has been worn and worn over time, it feels antique and splendid, like a work of art, at first glance.
1000610047.korean: - 세월에 닳고 달았지만 한 눈에 예술 작품처럼 고풍스럽고 화려하다는 것이 느껴진다.

1000610048.english: - But when I think about what happened there, I just don't feel like appreciating it.
1000610048.korean: - 하지만 저곳에서 벌어졌을 일을 생각하면, 도저히 감상할 기분은 들지 않는다.

1000610049.english: Yes, Your Majesty. Shall we go together, my darlings?
1000610049.korean: 네, 폐하. 아가들, 언니랑 같이 갈까요?

1000610050.english: - Armand, left alone after Charlotte disappeared, bit her lip as if she had made up her mind about something.
1000610050.korean: - 샬럿들이 사라지고 혼자 남은 아르망은 무언가 결심한듯 입술을 깨물고 있었다.

1000610051.english: - The Metal Parasites that were wandering around the road where the pavement was peeling off in some places and the parking lot in front of the theme park were quickly cleared out.
1000610051.korean: - 포장이 군데군데 벗겨진 길과 테마 파크 앞의 주차장을 배회하던 철충들은 순식간에 정리됐다.

1000610052.english: - I followed Charlotte and Alice to the tightly closed iron gate, carefully checking for any remaining Metal Parasite.
1000610052.korean: - 나는 남아있는 철충이 있는지 꼼꼼하게 확인한 샬럿과 앨리스를 따라 굳게 닫힌 철문으로 향했다.

1000610053.english: - A gloomy atmosphere hangs over the theme park, which is sinking into the thick sunset.
1000610053.korean: - 어느새 짙게 깔리는 석양 속에 가라앉는 테마 파크엔 스산한 기운이 감돈다.

1000610054.english: ...Your Majesty, I have something to tell you.

1000610055.english: A story about the old days... [c][ffd130]Halloween with Bioroids[-][/c].
1000610055.korean: 구 시대의... [c][ffd130]바이오로이드와의 할로윈[-][/c] 에 대한 이야기입니다.

1000610056.english: Your Majesty treats us as persons, no, as equals to Your Majesty...
1000610056.korean: 폐하께선 저희를 인격체로서, 아니 폐하와 동등하게 대해주시지만...

1000610057.english: As you know, before the destruction of humanity, we Bioroids were nothing more than tools.
1000610057.korean: 아시다시피 멸망 전의 인류에게 저희 바이오로이드들은 도구 이하였습니다.

1000610058.english: - Armand's voice begins to tremble slightly. Even I, who knows what's coming, feel a heavy heart.
1000610058.korean: - 아르망의 목소리가 조금씩 떨리기 시작한다. 무슨 이야기가 나올지 알고 있는 나도 마음이 무거워진다.

1000610059.english: Even though we were mass-produced, we were incomparably stronger than humans, so we would have been good toys.
1000610059.korean: 양산형이라도 인간님들과는 비교도 할 수 없이 튼튼한 저희들은 좋은 장난감이었겠죠.

1000610060.english: These 'theme parks', which were located in various places, were normally ordinary facilities, but during Halloween...
1000610060.korean: 각지에 있었던 이런 '테마 파크' 들은 평소엔 평범한 시설이었지만, 할로윈 기간에는...

1000610061.english: Every year during Halloween, countless Bioroids that were nearing the end of their lifespan, were seriously injured, or were otherwise discarded were sent to these 'theme parks'.
1000610061.korean: 수명이 다 되어가거나, 크게 다쳤거나, 용도폐기된 수많은 바이오로이드들이 매년 할로윈 기간마다 이 '테마 파크' 들로 보내졌습니다.

1000610062.english: Of course, more people than that gathered like clouds.
1000610062.korean: 물론 그 이상의 인간님들이 구름처럼 모여들었죠.

1000610063.english: - Armand turned her head and looked at the wide parking lot and the driveway, which must have been well-maintained.
1000610063.korean: - 아르망이 고개를 돌려 넓디 넓은 주차장과 잘 정비되어 있었을 것이 분명한 진입로를 돌아보았다.

1000610065.english: - Armand looked at me with intense gaze, her body trembling, and tears welled up in her eyes.
1000610065.korean: - 몸을 떨면서도 강하게 나를 바라보는 아르망의 눈가엔 눈물이 맺혀있었다.

1000610066.english: - My heart weakens when I see her fists clenched so tightly that her skin turns pale and her body tremble.
1000610066.korean: - 피부가 새하얘질 정도로 꽉 쥔 주먹과 부들부들 떨리는 몸을 보고 마음이 약해진다.

1000610067.english: Your Majesty, I cannot at this moment predict the outcome after Your Majesty has seen those records.
1000610067.korean: 폐하, 폐하께서 그 기록들을 보신 후의 결과를 지금 저는 도저히 예측할 수 없습니다.

1000610068.english: If, by any chance, Your Majesty...

1000610069.english: - The tears that had been welling up in Armand's eyes finally fell to the floor.
1000610069.korean: - 아르망의 눈에 맺혀있던 눈물이 결국 바닥으로 뚝뚝 떨어졌다.

1000610071.english: - I looked at the 'Candy Hunters' who were cowering in the corner in the serious atmosphere, watching me.
1000610071.korean: - 심각한 분위기에 구석에서 쭈뼛거리며 내 눈치를 보고 있는 '캔디 헌터' 들에게 시선을 주었다.

1000610072.english: - I have to check with my own eyes and correct anything that is wrong.
1000610072.korean: - 내 눈으로 확인하고, 잘못된 것은 고쳐야 한다.

1000610073.english: - So that it doesn't happen again.

1000610075.english: - Fenrir stepped forward and swung her chain blade at a speed that was invisible to the eye.
1000610075.korean: - 앞으로 나선 펜리르가 눈에 보이지도 않는 속도로 체인블레이드를 휘둘렀다.

1000610076.english: - Countless cracks were engraved, and the huge iron gate was shattered and slowly collapsed.
1000610076.korean: - 수많은 실금이 새겨지고, 거대한 철문이 조각나 천천히 무너져 내렸다.

1000610078.english: - Armand's soft voice was heard through the heavy sound of falling iron.
1000610078.korean: - 쇳덩이가 쏟아지는 육중한 소리 틈으로 아르망의 나지막한 목소리가 들렸다.

1000610081.english: Witch! I brought you my master!

1000610082.english: Hurry up and give me something delicious!

1000610083.english: - I followed Fenrir into the theme park.
1000610083.korean: - 펜리르의 뒤를 따라 테마파크 안으로 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000610084.english: - As if to welcome us, the lights in the previously dark theme park come on, and exciting music begins to play.
1000610084.korean: - 마치 우리를 환영하기라도 하는 것처럼 불이 꺼져 있던 테마파크에 조명이 들어오고,&n흥겨운 음악이 흐르기 시작한다.

1000610085.english: - At first glance, it looks like an ordinary theme park... but the excited candy hunters are lost in their thoughts and are looking up at the flashing lights along the central street.
1000610085.korean: - 일단은 평범한 테마파크 같아 보이는데... 신이 난 캔디 헌터들이 넋을 놓고&n중앙 대로를 따라 번쩍이는 조명들을 올려다보았다.

1000610088.english: Ahem. The great expedition is over!

1000610089.english: Loyal Candy Hunters! Loyal loot to your heart's content... huh?
1000610089.korean: 충성스러운 캔디 헌터들이여! 마음껏 전리품을... 응?

1000610090.english: - A thumping sound was heard from inside the theme park. ...An explosion?

1000610092.english: I'll be blocking you from the front!

1000610093.english: Stay by your master's side. I don't know when another bug crawled in, but I'll take care of it.
1000610093.korean: 주인님의 곁을 지키세요. 어느새 또 벌레가 기어들어 왔는지는 모르겠지만, 제가 처리하죠.

1000610094.english: - Unlike the Bioroids who surround me, wary of the surroundings, Armand quietly looks down.
1000610094.korean: - 주변을 경계하며 나를 둘러싸는 바이오로이드들과는 달리 아르망은 가만히 눈을 내리깔고 있다.

1000610095.english: - I could sense what was going on with it.
1000610095.korean: - 그것으로 무슨 일이 벌어지고 있는지 눈치챌 수 있었다.

1000610097.english: - As Alice put her weapon away, the souvenir shop in front exploded.
1000610097.korean: - 앨리스가 무장을 집어넣는 것과 동시에 정면에 있던 기념품 가게가 터져나갔다.

1000610100.english: - Two people who looked like they came out of a fairy tale were chasing and being chased, fighting.
1000610100.korean: - 동화 속에서 튀어나온 듯한 모습의 두 사람이 쫓고 쫓기며 전투를 벌였다.

1000610101.english: - Every time Veronica swung her giant scythe, the flying bat-shaped machine exploded.
1000610101.korean: - 베로니카가 거대한 낫을 휘두를 때마다 날아다니던 박쥐 모양 기계가 터져나갔다.

1000610103.english: Hey, you! Do you know how much trouble I put into making those kids?!
1000610103.korean: 이봐요, 당신! 제가 저 아이들 만든다고 얼마나 고생한지 알아요?!

1000610104.english: You talk a lot. Silence is a virtue.

1000610105.english: I will keep you silent forever...

1000610106.english: Huh?! I don't want to do that... Oh my!

1000610107.english: - The two people who finally discovered us stopped moving at the same time and came forward.
1000610107.korean: - 마침내 우리를 발견한 두 사람이 동시에 움직임을 멈추고 앞으로 다가왔다.

1000610108.english: Oh my, I was wondering why there was an uninvited guest, but it's finally the invited guest!
1000610108.korean: 어머머, 웬 불청객이 왔나 했더니 이제야 초대받으신 분께서 오셨군요!

1000610109.english: May the light be with you, Savior. I am Veronica, Azazel's representative.
1000610109.korean: 구원자님께 빛이 함께 하기를. 아자젤님의 대리인, 베로니카라고 합니다.

1000610110.english: My name is Circe, and I'm the park manager. Come here, come here... Oh my.
1000610110.korean: 저는 이 파크의 관리인인 키르케라고 해요. 자자, 어서 이쪽으로... 어머.

1000610111.english: Get your filthy hands off my Savior, witch.
1000610111.korean: 구원자님에게서 그 더러운 손을 떼세요, 마녀.

1000610112.english: - Veronica's huge scythe reached Circe's neck.
1000610112.korean: - 베로니카의 거대한 낫이 키르케의 목에 닿았다.

1000610113.english: - Even in that situation, Circe still smiles brightly and shrugs her shoulders.
1000610113.korean: - 그런 상황에서도 여전히 생글생글 웃으며 어깨를 으쓱해 보이는 키르케.

1000610114.english: - Azazel looked back at Veronica's fierce demeanor, as if she were about to swing her scythe at any moment.
1000610114.korean: - 당장이라도 낫을 휘두를 것 같은 베로니카의 흉흉한 기세에 아자젤을 돌아보았다.

1000610115.english: Agent, put away your sword. It is not for the human male to shed blood among us.
1000610115.korean: 대리인이여, 검을 거두세요. 저희끼리 피를 흘리는 것은 인간 남성께서 바라시는 것이 아닙니다.

1000610116.english: Instead... please turn the tip of that sword to the other side.
1000610116.korean: 그 대신... 그 칼끝을 다른 쪽으로 돌려주시길.

1000610117.english: Hmm... I'm sure there will be more uninvited guests since we've caused such a ruckus!
1000610117.korean: 흐음... 확실히 이렇게 난리를 쳤으니 초대받지 않은 손님들이 또! 오실 것 같네요.

1000610118.english: Thanks to that, my work also increased.

1000610119.english: - Without even looking at the whining Circe, Veronica put her hands together towards me and Azazel.
1000610119.korean: - 빈정거리는 키르케에겐 눈길도 주지 않고 베로니카가 나와 아자젤을 향해 두 손을 모았다.

1000610120.english: If you want to do that...

1000610121.english: I will do as the light wills.

1000610122.english: Young Bioroid, please guide the human male to safety.
1000610122.korean: 어린 바이오로이드여, 인간 남성을 안전한 곳으로 안내해주세요.

1000610123.english: Ah, yes! Commander, let's go this way!

1000610124.english: Alvis will hide you behind the coffin!

1000610125.english: - The sight inside the restricted area that we finally entered was a little different from what we had imagined.
1000610125.korean: - 마침내 들어선 통제구역 안의 모습은 상상과는 조금 달랐다.

1000610126.english: - It is a bit narrow and weathered, but it is more luxurious and luxurious than any other area in the theme park.
1000610126.korean: - 넓이는 조금 좁고 세월에 풍화되었지만, 테마파크의 그 어떤 구역보다도 화려하고 고급스러운 모습.

1000610128.english: - Just by that alone, we could see how humanity thought of Bioroids before their destruction.
1000610128.korean: - 단지 그것만으로도 멸망 전의 인류가 바이오로이드들을 어떻게 생각하고 있었는지 알 수 있었다.

1000610130.english: - Even though it must have been decades since it became a ruin, a foul smell still lingers throughout the area.
1000610130.korean: - 폐허가 된 지 수십 년은 훨씬 지났을 텐데도 구역 곳곳에서 악취가 느껴지는 것 같다.

1000610131.english: It is exactly as you heard from Cardinal Armand.

1000610132.english: Some of the Bioroids sent to the theme park are here...
1000610132.korean: 테마파크로 보내진 바이오로이드들 중 일부는 이곳에서...

1000610133.english: - Azazel's words were vague, but her next words were clear.
1000610133.korean: - 아자젤은 말을 흐렸지만 이어질 말은 분명하다.

1000610134.english: - I suppressed my nausea and turned around, only to meet eyes with an unexpected person.
1000610134.korean: - 구역질을 억누르며 몸을 돌리다 뜻밖의 인물과 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000610136.english: - Charlotte ran behind Dutch Girl, who was looking at the buildings, gasping for breath.
1000610136.korean: - 숨을 몰아쉬며 건물들을 바라보는 더치걸의 뒤에서 샬럿이 달려왔다.

1000610137.english: Honey, you can't go out like that alone! What if you get lost?
1000610137.korean: 아가, 그렇게 혼자 가버리면 안 돼요! 길 잃으면 어쩌려고!

1000610138.english: Oh my, Your Majesty is here too!

1000610139.english: I knew this would happen. Are you trying to wag your tail at His Majesty because you can't stand it anymore?
1000610139.korean: 이럴 줄 알았어요. 그새를 못 참고 폐하에게 꼬리를 치려고 하는 건가요?

1000610140.english: Using even a kid to make excuses... This is really low-level.
1000610140.korean: 핑계를 대려고 꼬맹이까지 이용하다니... 정말 수준 떨어지는군요.

1000610141.english: Huh? You say the level is low?

1000610142.english: I will first address Your Majesty...

1000610143.english: - Charlotte, who was about to respond, noticed that the atmosphere was unusual and closed her mouth.
1000610143.korean: - 받아치려던 샬럿이 분위기가 심상치 않은 것을 눈치채고 입을 다물었다.

1000610144.english: - Alice also narrowed her eyes and began to look at the surrounding buildings.
1000610144.korean: - 앨리스도 눈을 가늘게 뜨고 주변 건물들을 살펴보기 시작했다.

1000610147.english: - I'm concerned about the Dutch girl who is still breathing heavily without even looking at me or anyone else.
1000610147.korean: - 나를 포함해 다른 사람들에게는 눈길도 주지 않고 여전히 숨을 몰아쉬고 있는 더치걸이 신경 쓰인다.

1000610148.english: - It may look ordinary on the outside, but staying in a place like this for a long time would not be good for your emotions.
1000610148.korean: - 겉보기에는 평범하지만 이런 곳에 오래 있는 건 정서적으로 좋지 않겠지.

1000610150.english: - The Dutch girl's small body trembles as she turns her head with difficulty to look up at me.
1000610150.korean: - 가까스로 고개를 돌려 나를 올려다보는 더치걸의 작은 몸이 덜덜 떨리고 있다.

1000610151.english: Uh, yeah... It's okay. Just, back in the old days...

1000610152.english: Your Majesty, there is a reaction of Metal Parasite deep within the area.
1000610152.korean: 폐하, 구역 깊숙한 곳에 철충 반응이 있습니다.

1000610153.english: I think some of them have spotted us and are approaching us.
1000610153.korean: 그중 일부가 저희를 발견한 것 같아요. 이쪽으로 접근 중입니다.

1000610155.english: - The Dutch girl slowly shook her head.

1000610156.english: It's okay, I can do it... with my sisters...

1000610158.english: Well, Master has an angel by his side...

1000610161.english: - Charlotte, who had been waiting, took the Dutch girl's hand and headed inside the area.
1000610161.korean: - 기다리고 있던 샬럿이 더치걸의 손을 잡고 구역 안쪽으로 향했다.

1000610162.english: - The Bioroids that had finished the battle were seen returning.
1000610162.korean: - 전투를 끝낸 바이오로이드들이 돌아오는 모습이 보였다.

1000610163.english: - The Dutch girl was holding the hands of Charlotte and Fenrir, who were standing on either side of her.
1000610163.korean: - 더치걸은 양옆에 선 샬럿과 펜리르의 손을 잡고 있었다.

1000610167.korean: 주인님, 안쪽에선 더 나쁜 냄새가 나.

1000610169.english: - I calmed down Fenrir, who was pulling at my clothes, and bent down to meet the Dutch girl's gaze.
1000610169.korean: - 내 옷을 잡아당기는 펜리르를 진정시키고 몸을 숙여 더치걸과 시선을 맞췄다.

1000610171.english: - The Dutch girl's face was still dark, although she wasn't trembling like before.
1000610171.korean: - 조금 전처럼 몸을 벌벌 떨고 있진 않았지만 더치걸의 얼굴은 여전히 어두웠다.

1000610173.english: No... I'll tell you. If you're the commander...

1000610174.english: - The Dutch girl takes a deep breath and looks up at me.
1000610174.korean: - 작게 숨을 들이쉰 더치걸이 나를 올려다본다.

1000610175.english: ...Back when I was working in the coal mines...

1000610176.english: Sisters who were injured... or whose lives were over... have disappeared somewhere...
1000610176.korean: 다치거나... 수명이 다 되거나... 그런 자매들은, 어디론가 사라졌어...

1000610177.english: They said that humans would be restored and go to a better place...
1000610177.korean: 인간님들은 수복돼서 좋은 곳으로 간다고 했지만...

1000610178.english: The sisters said something like that... no one believed it...
1000610178.korean: 자매들은 그런 말... 아무도 믿지 않았어...

1000610180.english: - Hearing the Dutch girl's words, an inexplicable emotion welled up in my chest.
1000610180.korean: - 더치걸의 말을 듣고 가슴속에서 알 수 없는 감정이 끓어올랐다.

1000610181.english: Ahaha... Sorry for saying such strange things, Commander...
1000610181.korean: 아하하... 이상한 말 해서 미안해, 사령관...

1000610183.english: - My mind was so complicated that I couldn't catch the Dutch girl walking slowly out of the restricted area.
1000610183.korean: - 머릿속이 복잡해서 통제구역 밖으로 타박타박 걸음을 옮기는 더치걸을 미처 붙잡지 못했다.

1000610184.english: - Instead, I nodded to Fenrir, who was looking up at me blankly, and Fenrir ran and stood close to the Dutch Girl.
1000610184.korean: - 대신 나를 물끄러미 올려다보는 펜리르에게 고개를 끄덕여주자, 펜리르가 달려가 더치걸의 옆에 바짝 붙었다.

1000610186.english: - Charlotte, who loves children, seemed particularly shocked.
1000610186.korean: - 아이들을 좋아하는 샬럿은 특히 큰 충격을 받은 것 같았다.

1000610187.english: ...I'll go and check it out with my own eyes.

1000610189.english: I didn't know anything... It's really disgusting.

1000610191.english: I'm worried about the Commander-in-Chief's condition. May I come with you, Master?
1000610191.korean: 총사대장의 상태가 걱정되는군요. 저도 따라가도 될까요, 주인님?

1000610195.english: - Only then did I realize that my fist was clenched.
1000610195.korean: - 그제서야 주먹을 꽉 쥐고 있다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000610196.english: - Charlotte's expression was frozen as she walked back.
1000610196.korean: - 터벅터벅 돌아오는 샬럿의 표정이 얼어붙어 있었다.

1000610198.english: I just thought it was a fun festival...
1000610198.korean: 저는 그저, 그저 즐거운 축제인 줄로만...

1000610199.english: - Alice, who followed Charlotte, also had a cold face and was silent.
1000610199.korean: - 샬럿의 뒤를 따라온 앨리스도 차가운 얼굴을 한 채로 말이 없다.

1000610200.english: Your Majesty, give me an order!

1000610202.english: I'll destroy everything with my own hands!

1000610203.english: - I'd love to do that right now. But...
1000610203.korean: - 나도 당장이라도 그렇게 하고 싶다. 하지만...

1000610204.english: - I'm concerned about Circe, who has been guarding the park alone for a long time.
1000610204.korean: - 오랜 세월 홀로 파크를 지켜왔던 키르케가 마음에 걸린다.

1000610205.english: It must have been difficult to completely protect this vast place by oneself.
1000610205.korean: 아무래도 혼자서 이 넓은 곳을 완벽하게 지켜내는 건 어려웠겠죠.

1000610206.english: It seems that Circe was fighting the Iron Insects from Area A, where Her Majesty was first guided.
1000610206.korean: 키르케는 폐하께서 처음으로 안내받으셨던 A 구역을 거점으로 철충들을 상대하고&n있었던 것 같습니다.

1000610207.english: - Hearing Armand's words, I recalled the appearance of a district that was noticeably better than the other districts.
1000610207.korean: - 아르망의 말을 듣고 다른 구역들보다 확연히 상태가 좋았던 구역의 모습을 떠올렸다.

1000610208.english: While trying to prevent insects from entering from outside as much as possible, we dealt with insects inside the park...
1000610208.korean: 외부에서 철충이 들어오는 것을 최대한 막으면서, 파크 내부 철충들을 처리하다가...

1000610209.english: When her strength ran out, she drove the remaining worms into this place and closed it off.
1000610209.korean: 힘이 부치자 그녀는 남은 철충들을 이곳으로 몰아넣고 폐쇄해 버렸습니다.

1000610210.english: Why it had to be here... only he knows.

1000610211.english: - Armand's bitter expression and a glimpse of Circe's inner thoughts.
1000610211.korean: - 아르망의 씁쓸한 표정과 조금 엿보였던 키르케의 속마음.

1000610212.english: - What Circe wanted to protect was...

1000610213.english: Your Majesty, numerous iron signals are being detected in the center of the area, in the largest building.
1000610213.korean: 폐하. 구역 중앙, 가장 큰 건물에서 많은 철충 신호가 감지됩니다.

1000610214.english: There will be some resistance, although it won't be enough to harm Your Majesty.
1000610214.korean: 폐하께 해를 끼칠 정도는 아니지만 다소의 저항은 있겠죠.

1000610215.english: I think it would be better to deal with it all at once.
1000610215.korean: 한 번에 처리하는 것이 좋을 것이라 생각됩니다.

1000610220.english: I won't leave a single stone behind.

1000610221.english: - Charlotte ran out and Alice flew up, deploying her weapons.
1000610221.korean: - 샬럿이 달려나가고 앨리스가 날아올라 무장을 전개했다.

1000610222.english: Your Majesty, it would be best for you to first seek refuge in a safe place.
1000610222.korean: 폐하, 먼저 안전한 곳으로 몸을 피하시는 게 좋겠습니다.

1000610223.english: - She turned her head, leaving the restricted area behind.

1000610224.english: - I took note of the buildings starting to collapse under Alice's bombing so I wouldn't forget them.
1000610224.korean: - 앨리스의 폭격에 무너지기 시작하는 건물들을 잊지 않도록 눈에 담았다.

1000610225.english: - I waited for a while for the battle to end in the central square.

1000610226.english: - The intermittent noise of the battle died down.

1000610227.english: - While I was waiting for Charlotte and Alice with mixed feelings, the children came running to me with excited faces instead.
1000610227.korean: - 복잡한 심정으로 샬럿과 앨리스를 기다리던 중, 대신 아이들이 상기된 얼굴로 달려왔다.

1000610228.english: - LRL, who arrived first, hung on to my arm with shining eyes.
1000610228.korean: - 가장 먼저 도착한 LRL이 눈을 빛내며 팔에 매달렸다.

1000610230.english: Have you been there? It's full of candy and sweets!! And there's a Ferris wheel and a haunted house... Oh.
1000610230.korean: 저기, 저기 가 봤어? 사탕이랑 과자가 가득해!! 또 관람차랑, 귀신의 집이랑... 앗.

1000610231.english: Ahem... It was a place worthy of True Ancestor's dignity.

1000610232.english: - This time Alvis hung on the other arm.

1000610234.english: There you go! LRL was right. Chocolate, juice, and a blast! And...
1000610234.korean: 저기 있잖아! LRL 말이 진짜였어. 초코랑 주스랑 막막! 또...

1000610235.english: - I patted the heads of each child as they chattered excitedly about their adventures.
1000610235.korean: - 잔뜩 흥분해서 재잘재잘 모험담을 늘어놓는 아이들의 머리를 하나하나 쓰다듬어 주었다.

1000610236.english: - LRL and Alvis, who had been doing that for a very short while, ran to the other side of the square as if they had discovered something interesting.
1000610236.korean: - 아주 잠깐 동안 그러고 있던 LRL과 알비스는 또 무언가 재밌는 것을 발견했는지&n광장 반대편으로 달려갔다.

1000610237.english: - As if to replace her, this time Dutch Girl, Hachiko, and Fenrir approached.
1000610237.korean: - 그와 교대하듯 이번엔 더치걸과 하치코, 펜리르가 다가왔다.

1000610238.english: Yes! I made a new friend! It's a little scary, though...
1000610238.korean: 네! 새 친구도 사귀었어요! 조금 무섭긴 하지만...

1000610239.english: I did as Master told me. I was with a chubby friend and a strong friend.
1000610239.korean: 주인님이 시킨 대로 했어. 복실복실한 친구랑 튼튼한 친구랑 같이 있었어.

1000610240.english: Well then, I'm hungry, so I'll go find some meat. Let's go, my plump friend.
1000610240.korean: 그럼 난 배고프니까 고기 찾으러 갈게. 가자, 복실복실한 친구.

1000610242.english: Yeah, no. Fenrir and Hachiko were together.
1000610242.korean: 으응, 아니야. 펜리르랑 하치코가 같이 있어줬어.

1000610243.english: I know the Commander was doing something for us.
1000610243.korean: 사령관은 우리를 위한 일을 하고 있었다는 거 알아.

1000610244.english: - The Dutch girl looked towards the restricted area where dust and smoke were rising.
1000610244.korean: - 더치걸이 흙먼지와 연기가 피어오르는 통제구역 쪽을 바라봤다.

1000610245.english: My heart aches when I think of my sisters...

1000610246.english: Since the Commander saved me... I will work hard to provide for my sisters as well.
1000610246.korean: 사령관이 날 구원해줬으니까... 자매들 몫까지 열심히 살 거야.

1000610247.english: - The Dutch girl hugged my waist tightly and ran to Fenrir and Hachiko who were waiting.
1000610247.korean: - 내 허리를 한 번 꽉 껴안은 더치걸이 기다리고 있던 펜리르와 하치코에게 달려갔다.

1000610248.english: - Dutch Girl talking to Hachiko with a much brighter face.
1000610248.korean: - 한결 밝아진 얼굴로 하치코와 이야기를 나누는 더치걸.

1000610249.english: - As I was looking at the sight with a happy feeling, I heard the engine sound I had heard earlier.
1000610249.korean: - 그 모습을 흐뭇한 기분으로 바라보고 있을 때 아까 들었던 엔진 소리가 들렸다.

1000610250.english: Guest? Your subordinates completely destroyed Area C...
1000610250.korean: 손님? 손님의 부하들께서 C 구역을 완전히 박살을 내놓으셨던데...

1000610251.english: It's difficult to act like this. Do you know how much effort it takes to repair it?
1000610251.korean: 이렇게 진상을 부리시면 곤란하다구요~ 수리하는 데 얼마나 힘이 많이 드는지 아세요?

1000610252.english: Hmm... It's quite expensive, you know...

1000610253.english: Let's have a drink later and chat leisurely.
1000610253.korean: 나중에 술이라도 한잔하면서 느긋~하게 이야기를 나눠보죠.

1000610254.english: How long has it been since you sobered up and you're talking about drinking again?
1000610254.korean: 술이 깬 지 얼마나 됐다고 또 술 타령인가요?

1000610256.english: - Circe pointed to the marks of battle carved here and there in the central square.
1000610256.korean: - 키르케가 중앙 광장 여기저기에 새겨진 전투의 흔적들을 가리켰다.

1000610257.english: I was just executing the will of the light.

1000610258.english: Hmm, is it because I'm not wearing anything underneath that I want to show the light?
1000610258.korean: 흐응, 아래에 아무것도 안 입은 것도 빛의 뜻을 위해선가요?

1000610259.english: You saw everything just now? I was so shocked that I completely sobered up.
1000610259.korean: 아까 다 봤다구요? 깜짝 놀라서 술이 확 깨버렸어요.

1000610260.english: ...agents are always required to be neat and tidy.

1000610261.english: No other clothing is required other than this habit.
1000610261.korean: 이 수녀복 이외의 피복은 필요하지 않아요.

1000610262.english: It looks like my face is red, but it doesn't look like it is...
1000610262.korean: 얼굴이 빨개진 것 같기도 하고, 아닌 것 같기도 하고...

1000610263.english: - Circe observed Veronica's face with a sly smile. "It would be best to stop her before the second round begins."
1000610263.korean: - 능글맞게 웃으며 베로니카의 얼굴을 관찰하는 키르케. 2차전이 시작되기 전에 말리는 게 좋겠군.

1000610265.english: Then, in addition to alcohol... I have a medicine that I made...
1000610265.korean: 그럼 술에다... 제가 제조한 약이 하나 있는데...

1000610266.english: - Azazel, who was next to her, pulled Circe away from her sticky body.
1000610266.korean: - 끈적하게 몸을 붙이는 키르케를 옆에 있던 아자젤이 떼어냈다.

1000610268.english: - Azazel blushed at the teasing remark.

1000610269.english: My faith was lacking. The chosen one...

1000610270.english: The chosen one wouldn't turn his back on the light and indulge in lust. So, sometimes...
1000610270.korean: 선택받은 분께선 육욕에 빠져 빛을 등지지 않으시겠죠. 그, 그러니 가끔은...

1000610271.english: - Azazel's crawling voice was drowned out by the sound of running footsteps.
1000610271.korean: - 아자젤의 기어들어가는 목소리가 도도도 달려오는 발소리에 묻혔다.

1000610272.english: Blessed angel of light! Accept the baptism of the night!
1000610272.korean: 빛의 축복을 받은 천사여! 밤의 세례를 받아들이거라!

1000610273.english: Angel Sister! Let's go over there together! I haven't been there yet!
1000610273.korean: 천사 언니! 같이 저쪽, 저쪽 가보자! 저기는 아직 안 가봤어!

1000610274.english: - Azazel, who was at a loss after receiving the chocolate cookie given to her by LRL, asked me for help.
1000610274.korean: - LRL이 건넨 초코쿠키를 받아들고 어쩔 줄 몰라 하던 아자젤이 내게 도움을 요청했다.

1000610275.english: Seo, Chosen One. What should I do in this situation...
1000610275.korean: 서, 선택받은 분이시여. 이, 이럴 땐 어떻게 해야...

1000610276.english: - Azazel's expression became even more bewildered as the children pulled at her wings with curious eyes.
1000610276.korean: - 아이들이 호기심 어린 눈빛으로 날개를 잡아당기자 아자젤은 더욱 당혹스러운&n표정이 되었다.

1000610278.english: - A faint smile appeared on Azazel's lips as she took a bite of the cookie.
1000610278.korean: - 쿠키를 한 입 먹은 아자젤의 입가에 희미하게 미소가 걸렸다.

1000610281.english: Heh heh... The Candy Hunter's great journey is not over yet!
1000610281.korean: 큭큭... 캔디 헌터의 위대한 여정은 아직 끝나지 않았도다!

1000610282.english: Wherever the luggage goes, the road will become the road!
1000610282.korean: 짐이 가는 곳이 바로 길이 될 지어니!

1000610283.english: Come, angel! Guide the path of the great True Ancestor!
1000610283.korean: 자아, 천사여! 위대한 진조의 앞길을 인도하라!

1000610284.english: - Before she could even properly appreciate the comfortable smile she was seeing for the first time, Azazel was dragged away by the children.
1000610284.korean: - 처음으로 보는 편안한 웃음을 제대로 감상할 틈도 없이 아자젤은 아이들에게 끌려가버렸다.

1000610285.english: The kids are so cute. It's been a long time since I've seen them like that.
1000610285.korean: 아이들이 참 귀엽네요. 저런 모습을 보는 건... 정말 오랜만이에요.

1000610286.english: So I'm thinking of giving you a gift.

1000610287.english: - Circe took out a small switch from her bosom.
1000610287.korean: - 키르케가 품 속에서 작은 스위치를 꺼냈다.

1000610288.english: Hohoho, if it's dangerous, then it could be dangerous?

1000610289.english: - As Circe pressed the switch, a popping sound was heard and fireworks appeared in the night sky.
1000610289.korean: - 키르케가 스위치를 누르자 펑 소리와 함께 밤하늘에 불꽃이 수 놓였다.

1000610290.english: - Bright smiles spread across the faces of the children, who looked up at the sky and opened their mouths wide.
1000610290.korean: - 하늘을 올려다보며 입을 딱 벌린 아이들의 얼굴에 환한 웃음이 번졌다.

1000610292.english: - As if that had been conveyed, a comfortable smile appeared on Circe's lips.
1000610292.korean: - 그것이 전해지기라도 한 듯, 키르케의 입가에도 편안한 미소가 걸렸다.

1000610293.english: - Leaving Circe behind, I walked along, taking in the sight of the Bioroids enjoying the festival that began with fireworks.
1000610293.korean: - 키르케를 뒤로하고 불꽃놀이와 함께 시작된 축제를 즐기는 바이오로이드들의&n모습을 눈에 담으며 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000610294.english: - Veronica and Circe, who had become close friends, sat in a corner and drank together.
1000610294.korean: - 어느새 의기투합했는지 구석에 앉아 술잔을 기울이는 베로니카와 키르케.

1000610295.english: - Dutch Girl smiles in Charlotte's arms as she bickers with Alice.
1000610295.korean: - 앨리스와 티격태격하는 샬럿의 품에 안겨 미소를 짓는 더치걸.

1000610296.english: - Magical girls who came without knowing when...

1000610298.english: - Let's leave aside Faucre's tight-fitting magical girl outfit, but Moonbit... seems to be wearing quite a bit less...
1000610298.korean: - 꽉 끼는 뽀끄루의 마법소녀 복장은 그렇다고 치고, 백토는... 뭔가 많이 덜 입은 것 같은데...

1000610299.english: - Before I could even recover from the shock, Neodym, entering the square, caught my eye.
1000610299.korean: - 충격에서 벗어나기도 전에 광장으로 들어오는 네오딤이 내 시선을 사로잡았다.

1000610300.english: - I unconsciously grabbed my head at the outrageous outfit that was no less or more outrageous than the BaekTo.
1000610300.korean: - 백토보다 더하면 더했지 덜하지 않은 파격적인 복장에 나도 모르게 머리를 감싸 쥐었다.

1000610301.english: - Neodym keeps nodding her head and Brownie is next to her and chatters away nonstop... &n Brownie...!
1000610301.korean: - 연신 고개를 끄덕이는 네오딤과 그 옆에 달라붙어 쉴 새 없이 떠드는 브라우니...&n브라우니...!

1000610302.english: - The sight of the two people wandering around as if looking for someone sent shivers down my spine.
1000610302.korean: - 두리번거리며 누군가를 찾는 듯한 두 사람의 모습에 등골이 오싹해졌다.

1000610303.english: - I quickened my pace before I was caught and laid down in that sphere.
1000610303.korean: - 붙잡혀 저 구체 안에 눕혀지기 전에 발걸음을 재촉했다.

1000610304.english: - Soon, just as Alice had promised, we arrived at the restricted area where not a single stone fragment remained.
1000610304.korean: - 이윽고 앨리스가 장담한 대로 돌조각 하나 제대로 남아있지 않은 통제구역에 도착했다.

1000610305.english: - We must never forget this past buried in ashes.
1000610305.korean: - 잿더미 속에 파묻힌 이 과거를 결코 잊어서는 안되겠지.

1000610306.english: - But... remembering such a terrible thing is enough for me alone.
1000610306.korean: - 그렇지만... 그런 끔찍한 일을 기억하고 있는 건 나 하나로도 충분하다.

1000610307.english: - That kind of thing will never happen again.
1000610307.korean: - 그런 일은 절대로 반복되지 않을 것이다.

1000610309.english: - The sound of approaching footsteps brought me out of my thoughts.

1000610311.english: - Armand smiled faintly at my light-hearted response.
1000610311.korean: - 가볍게 응수하는 내 말에 아르망이 작게 웃었다.

1000610312.english: But now things will be different. We have enough data on Your Majesty.
1000610312.korean: 하지만 이제 다를거에요. 폐하에 대한 데이터가 충분히 모였습니다.

1000610315.english: - Armand, who had been pretending to be worried with a meaningful smile, opened her mouth.
1000610315.korean: - 의미심장한 미소를 지으며 고민하는 척하던 아르망이 입을 열었다.

1000610316.english: That kind of thing... will never happen again.
1000610316.korean: 그런 일은... 다시는 반복되지 않을 거예요.

1000610317.english: As long as Your Majesty is present.

1000610320.english: - Circe, who was twice as cheerful as before, kept pulling me away.
1000610320.korean: - 전보다 두 배는 유쾌해진 키르케가 연신 나를 잡아끌었다.

1000610321.english: This way, this way~ Oh my.

1000610323.english: I don't mind, but I wonder if the customer will hate it?

1000610324.english: - Circe strode towards Veronica, who was blocking her way, and held out a flask containing an amber liquid.
1000610324.korean: - 앞을 막아서는 베로니카에게 성큼성큼 다가간 키르케가 호박색 액체가 담긴 플라스크를 내밀었다.

1000610325.english: Don't be so boring! Come on, Sister, have a drink too!
1000610325.korean: 그렇게 재미없게 굴지 마시고! 자, 수녀님도 한잔 해요오~

1000610326.english: Savior, you should not be with such a pagan.
1000610326.korean: 구원자님, 이런 이교도의 곁에 계셔선 안됩니다.

1000610328.english: - Veronica continued speaking without even glancing at Circe, who was gulping down her drink.
1000610328.korean: - 술을 벌컥벌컥 들이켜는 키르케에게 눈길도 주지 않고 베로니카가 말을 이었다.

1000610330.english: Wow... this alcohol tastes really good~

1000610331.english: - Circe, who had emptied the flask she was holding in an instant, staggered and took out a new bottle.
1000610331.korean: - 들고 있던 플라스크를 순식간에 비워버린 키르케가 비틀거리며 새 병을 꺼내들었다.

1000610332.english: - Veronica, cut off from her words, glares at Circe with a fierce air...
1000610332.korean: - 말을 잘린 베로니카가 흉흉한 기세로 키르케를 노려본다...

1000610333.english: I'm... I'm so happy that you've come after a long time~
1000610333.korean: 저는요오... 오랜만에 손님이 오셔서 기분이 너~무 좋은 데에~

1000610334.english: Sister, why do you keep interrupting me? And don't you even drink with me?
1000610334.korean: 수녀님으은~ 왜 자꾸 방해만 하는 거에요~ 술도 같이 안마셔주구...

1000610335.english: - Circe, her face flushed bright red, began to hiccup.
1000610335.korean: - 얼굴이 새빨갛게 달아오른 키르케가 딸꾹질을 하기 시작했다.

1000610336.english: Why? It feels so good~ Ah, my drink...
1000610336.korean: 왜요? 이렇~게 기분 좋은데~ 아앗, 내 술...

1000610337.english: - Circe, who had her bottle snatched away and collapsed on the floor, looked at Azazel with wide eyes.
1000610337.korean: - 술병을 빼앗기고 바닥에 털썩 주저앉은 키르케가 아자젤을 보고 눈이 휘둥그레졌다.

1000610339.english: Oh my gosh! You finally came to save me!

1000610340.english: I have been guarding this place well and kindly.
1000610340.korean: 저느은~ 착하게 여기 잘 지키고 있었어요오~

1000610341.english: ...I can no longer stand to see you embarrassing yourself in front of the Savior.
1000610341.korean: ...구원자님 앞에서 추태를 부리는 모습을 더는 두고 볼 수 없군요.

1000610344.english: - Veronica, who was pulling Circe out, stopped moving.

1000610345.english: Ohhh~ Of course, you're cute, Sonni...

1000610348.english: - Veronica frowned as she watched Circe answer softly.
1000610348.korean: - 나지막하게 대답하는 키르케를 보며 베로니카가 눈살을 찌푸렸다.

1000610349.english: Are you trying to lead the Savior there even though you know it?
1000610349.korean: 알고 있으면서도 구원자님을 그곳으로 인도하려는 건가요?

1000610351.english: Guarding this place, guiding guests—it's all my mission.
1000610351.korean: 이곳을 지키는 것도, 손님을 안내하는 것도. 전부 제 사명이에요.

1000610355.english: Poor one, bound by the shackles of fate...

1000610356.english: Veronica, please take care of this person.

1000610358.english: Your Majesty, our guide is gone. What will you do?
1000610358.korean: 안내자가 없어졌군요, 폐하. 어떻게 하실 건가요?

1000610359.english: - Let's call Charlotte and Alice, who will be looking for me.

1000610360.english: There is no need to do that.

1000610361.english: Azazel and I will serve Your Majesty.

1000610362.english: - I wonder if there was some kind of change of heart. No, that can't be it.
1000610362.korean: - 무슨 심경의 변화가 있었던 걸까. 아니, 그게 아니겠지.

1000610363.english: - Armand's gaze, looking at me silently, was still the same.
1000610363.korean: - 말없이 나를 바라보는 아르망의 눈빛은 아직 그대로였다.

1000610364.english: However, a signal from the iron gate is detected near the destination.
1000610364.korean: 다만, 목적지 근처에서 철충 신호가 감지됩니다.

1000610365.english: We'll handle it. Just give us your instructions.

1000610366.english: - After dealing with the occasional Metal Parasites blocking the road, we finally arrived in front of the restricted area.
1000610366.korean: - 드문드문 길을 막아서는 철충들을 처리하고 마침내 도착한 통제구역 앞.

1000610367.english: - Armand, who had been quietly following me, ran ahead of me and blocked my path with her arms outstretched.
1000610367.korean: - 조용히 뒤를 따르던 아르망이 나를 앞질러 양 팔을 벌린 채 앞을 가로막았다.

1000610368.english: Even with limited data, I was able to predict His Majesty's actions.

1000610369.english: The data of His Majesty that was entered, and the personality of His Majesty that I saw from the side.
1000610369.korean: 입력 받았던 폐하의 데이터, 그리고 곁에서 본 폐하의 성품.

1000610370.english: I know the odds of what I'm worried about happening are extremely low, but...
1000610370.korean: 제가 걱정하는 일이 일어날 확률은 극히 낮다는 것은 알고 있습니다. 그렇지만...

1000610371.english: - Armand's voice, which had been speaking with a stern face, begins to tremble slightly.
1000610371.korean: - 단호한 얼굴로 말하던 아르망의 목소리가 가늘게 떨리기 시작한다.

1000610372.english: But that scene just won't leave my mind. Your Majesty, I...
1000610372.korean: 그렇지만, 그 장면이 도저히 머릿속을 떠나지 않습니다. 폐하, 저는, 그런건...

1000610373.korean: 그런것은, 저는 도저히... 감당할 수, 없습니다...

1000610374.english: - I sensed determination from Armand, who deliberately came to a place where there was no more room to retreat and blocked me.
1000610374.korean: - 일부러 더이상 물러설 곳이 없는 곳까지 와서 나를 막아서는 아르망에게서 각오가 느껴졌다.

1000610375.english: - Even if I had condoned it, it would have been a great burden for Armand to act against my will.
1000610375.korean: - 아무리 내가 묵인해 줬더라도 내 의지에 반하는 행동을 하는 것은 아르망에게도 큰 부담이었을 것이다.

1000610376.english: - The eyes looking at me tremble anxiously.

1000610377.english: ...But His Majesty will not change his mind.

1000610378.english: - I want to reassure Armand, but in the end, there is only one thing I can say.
1000610378.korean: - 그런 아르망을 안심시켜주고 싶지만, 내가 할 수 있는 말은 결국 하나 뿐이다.

1000610380.english: - Armand lowered her arms and slowly stepped back.

1000610381.english: I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused you, Your Majesty.
1000610381.korean: 그동안 염려를 끼쳐 드려 죄송합니다, 폐하.

1000610382.english: I will do my best to assist you until Your Majesty confirms the truth.
1000610382.korean: 폐하께서 진상을 확인하실 때까지 최선을 다해 보좌하는 것으로 만회하겠습니다.

1000610383.english: - While talking to Armand, Azazel, who had been quietly standing next to her, took the lead toward the restricted area.
1000610383.korean: - 아르망과 이야기를 나누는 동안 옆에서 조용히 자리를 지키고 있던 아자젤이 통제구역을 향해 앞장섰다.

1000610384.english: A human male, no, the chosen one.

1000610385.english: In the end, I couldn't break your resolve. I will trust that will.
1000610385.korean: 결국 그대의 뜻을 꺾을 수 없었군요. 그 의지를 믿겠습니다.

1000610386.english: May the light illuminate our path ahead.

1000610387.english: - Just as I was about to follow Azazel and Armand into the restricted area, I heard the sound of light footsteps kicking dirt behind me.
1000610387.korean: - 아자젤과 아르망을 따라 통제구역으로 들어가려는 찰나, 뒤에서 흙을 차는 가벼운 발소리가 들렸다.

1000610388.english: Don't go in here! It... smells bad.
1000610388.korean: 들어가면 안 돼! 여기... 안 좋은 냄새가 나.

1000610389.english: - The hairs on Fenrir's ears and tail stand up stiffly as she grabs my arm.
1000610389.korean: - 내 팔을 붙잡는 펜리르의 귀와 꼬리의 털이 빳빳하게 서 있다.

1000610390.english: - A growl escapes between sharp fangs, as if instinctively feeling uneasy.
1000610390.korean: - 본능적으로 꺼림칙함을 느끼는지 날카로운 송곳니 사이로 으르렁거리는 소리가 새어나온다.

1000610391.english: Yeah. Stay right next to me.
1000610391.korean: 응. 내 옆에 꼭 붙어 있어.

1000610392.english: - Following Azazel, who was in the lead, we finally set foot inside the restricted area.
1000610392.korean: - 앞장선 아자젤을 따라, 드디어 통제구역 안으로 발을 디뎠다.

1000610393.english: - Battle over. All the surrounding Metal Parasites seem to have rushed in.
1000610393.korean: - 전투 종료. 주변의 철충이란 철충은 전부 달려든 것 같다.

1000610394.english: - Even the children who were on edge while I was conducting relaxed.
1000610394.korean: - 내가 지휘 하는 동안 바짝 신경을 곤두세우고 있던 아이들도 긴장을 풀었다.

1000610395.english: Commander, are you okay? Were you hiding well behind the coffin?
1000610395.korean: 사령관님 괜찮아? 관 뒤에 잘 숨어있었어?

1000610396.english: - I stroked Alvis's head with gratitude.
1000610396.korean: - 고마운 마음에 알비스의 머리를 쓰다듬어 주었다.

1000610397.english: Hahaha. You're still very good at commanding your subordinates, human.
1000610397.korean: 후후후. 여전히 수하들을 부리는 실력이 훌륭하군. 인간.

1000610398.english: Do you have any intention of coming under this True Ancestor?
1000610398.korean: 이 진조의 밑으로 들어올 생각은 없느냐?

1000610399.english: - I waited for the report while gently pinching the excited LRL's cheek.
1000610399.korean: - 들떠있는 LRL의 볼을 살짝 꼬집어 주며 보고를 기다렸다.

1000610400.english: - A short gap between the end of a battle and the reporting of the results.
1000610400.korean: - 전투 종료 후 결과 보고까지의 짧은 틈.

1000610401.english: - The kids were chattering beside me as I thought about the truth about the theme park that I hadn't yet confirmed.
1000610401.korean: - 아직 확인하지 못한 테마파크의 진상에 대해 생각하는 내 곁에서 아이들이 재잘댔다.

1000610402.english: Look at that! LRL, have you ever been on a Ferris wheel?
1000610402.korean: 저것 봐! LRL,혹시 관람차 타본 적 있어?

1000610404.english: Ahem... Heh, the vampire King doesn't care about such trivial things!
1000610404.korean: 흠흠... 흐, 흡혈귀왕은 저런 시시한 것에 관심 없느니라!

1000610405.english: Really? Then I'm going to ride?

1000610407.english: Heh heh, it would be nice to climb up to a high place to look down on the creatures on earth...
1000610407.korean: 큭큭, 지상의 미물들을 굽어보려면 높은 곳에 올라가 보는 것도 좋겠군...

1000610408.english: - I ended up bringing the kids along, but I'm happy that they seem to like it.
1000610408.korean: - 어쩌다보니 아이들까지 같이 와버렸지만 일단 마음에 들어하는 것 같아 흐뭇해진다.

1000610409.english: - ... While I was having such a pleasant time, I heard the sound of shoes clicking behind me.
1000610409.korean: - ... 그렇게 기분좋은 시간을 보내는 와중에 등 뒤에서 또각거리는 구두소리가 들려왔다.

1000610410.english: Who knew such perfect clothes existed... This place is truly made for me.
1000610410.korean: 이렇게 완벽한 옷이 있었다니... 이곳은 정말 절 위한 곳이군요.

1000610411.english: Haha... I should have brought a few more sets.
1000610411.korean: 후후... 몇 벌 더 가져올 걸 그랬어요.

1000610412.english: - Alice appeared before me. The clothes she was wearing were...
1000610412.korean: - 내 앞에 나타난 앨리스. 앨리스가 걸치고 있는 옷은...

1000610414.english: - Alice's important parts were barely covered by a piece of cloth that was barely enough to be called clothing.
1000610414.korean: - 앨리스의 주요 부위들은 옷이라고 하기도 민망할 수준의 천조각에 겨우 가려져 있었다.

1000610416.english: Whoa! It's a pervert!! LRL? LRL!! There's a pervert sister here!
1000610416.korean: 흐와! 변태다!! LRL? LRL!! 여기 변태 언니가 있어!

1000610417.english: Huh...? What's that... I can see everything... Is it clothes...?
1000610417.korean: 어...? 저게 뭐야... 다, 다보이는데... 옷, 인가...?

1000610418.english: - The children, unable to withstand the sexiness emanating from Alice, began to back away.
1000610418.korean: - 꼬마들은 앨리스에게서 흘러나오는 색기를 버티지 못하고 뒷걸음질 치기 시작했다.

1000610419.english: Okay, I don't have time to play with the kids right now.
1000610419.korean: 자아~ 지금은 꼬맹이들하고 놀아줄 시간이 없어요.

1000610420.english: From now on, this sister has something to do with Master.
1000610420.korean: 이 언니는 지금부터... 주인님과 해야 할 일이 있거든요.

1000610421.english: - Even I took a step back at Alice's eyes, which were dripping with desire as she glanced at me.
1000610421.korean: - 힐끗 쳐다보는 앨리스의 욕망이 뚝뚝 떨어지는 눈빛에 나조차도 뒷걸음질 치고 말았다.

1000610422.english: Okay, everyone, take one of these and try to go as far as you can and play.
1000610422.korean: 자, 다들 이걸 하나씩 받고 최대한 멀리가서 놀도록 하세요.

1000610423.english: - Alice gave Alvis and LRL a cookie each.
1000610423.korean: - 앨리스는 알비스와 LRL의 손에 쿠키를 하나씩 쥐어 주었다.

1000610424.english: Oh! This is a cookie I've never seen before! Where did you get it?
1000610424.korean: 오! 이건 처음 보는 쿠키야! 어디서 났어?

1000610425.english: Hmm... Okay. If you follow this road, you'll come across a candy store.
1000610425.korean: 음... 좋아요. 이 길을 따라가면 과자 가게가 나올거에요.

1000610426.english: There's a mountain of sweet cookies... go ahead and take out as many as you want.
1000610426.korean: 달콤한 쿠키가 산더미처럼 쌓여있으니까... 가서 원하는대로 꺼내 먹어요.

1000610428.english: Really? As I please? Commander? Can I go? Huh? Huh?
1000610428.korean: 정말? 내 맘대로? 사령관님? 나 가도 돼? 응? 응?

1000610429.english: Then I'll go? I'll bring everything! Have fun with Alice!
1000610429.korean: 그럼 나 간다? 전부 담아올게! 앨리스 언니랑 재밌게 놀아!

1000610430.english: Wait, LRL? You left Count Alvis behind?!
1000610430.korean: 잠깐, LRL? 이 알비스 백작을 두고 간거야?!

1000610431.english: - While I was seeing the children off, I felt a hot gaze on the back of my head.
1000610431.korean: - 얼떨결에 아이들을 배웅해주고 있는 사이, 뒷통수에 뜨거운 시선이 꽂히는게 느껴진다.

1000610432.english: Oh? All the little troublemakers have disappeared?
1000610432.korean: 어라? 꼬맹이 방해꾼들이 전부 사라져 버렸네요?

1000610433.english: What does that matter? Anyway... Do you like it, Master?
1000610433.korean: 그런게 뭐가 중요하겠어요? 어쨌든... 마음에 드세요, 주인님?

1000610434.english: - Alice slowly turns around as if she wants to show off her clothes in front of me.
1000610434.korean: - 내 앞에서 옷을 자랑하려는지 천천히 한바퀴 돌아보이는 앨리스.

1000610435.english: - Alice noticed my gaze as I stared at her, forgetting to breathe, and gave me a provocative look.
1000610435.korean: - 숨 쉬는 것도 잊고 그 모습을 바라보는 내 시선을 눈치챈 앨리스가 도발적인 눈빛을 던졌다.

1000610436.english: Oh...? Where is my master looking at me...?
1000610436.korean: 어라...? 주인님께서는 제 어디를 보고 계신걸까요...?

1000610438.english: - Alice's fingers, wrapped in black gloves, slowly moved down her stomach.
1000610438.korean: - 검은 장갑에 감싸인 앨리스의 손가락이 배를 따라 천천히 내려갔다.

1000610439.english: Oh my, you are so kind.

1000610440.english: - I desperately searched my pockets for candy.
1000610440.korean: - 난 필사적으로 주머니를 뒤적이며 사탕을 찾았다.

1000610441.english: - Alice, who had been watching me flustered with amusement, grabbed my hand.
1000610441.korean: - 허둥대는 나를 즐겁게 바라보던 앨리스가 내 손을 낚아챘다.

1000610442.english: - The soft touch and warmth on my palm take away my reason.
1000610442.korean: - 손바닥에 와닿는 부드러운 감촉과 체온이 이성을 앗아간다.

1000610443.english: Master? This is all a dream.

1000610444.english: In dreams... you can do whatever you want, right?

1000610448.english: - Circe appeared riding a broom with the sound of an engine.
1000610448.korean: - 엔진소리와 함께 키르케가 빗자루를 타고 등장했다.

1000610449.english: - If it weren't for Circe, it would have been really over...

1000610450.english: Well, it's not that I don't understand...

1000610451.english: - Circe whirled around and tapped on the wall where the instructions were written.
1000610451.korean: - 키르케가 빙글거리며 안내가 적혀있는 벽을 톡톡 두드렸다.

1000610452.english: - Alice's expression grew cold. Circe, who had casually accepted Alice's cold, open gaze, clapped her hands.
1000610452.korean: - 앨리스의 표정이 차갑게 식었다. 대놓고 싸늘하게 쏘아보는 앨리스의 시선을 아무렇지도 않게 받아넘긴 키르케가 손뼉을 쳤다.

1000610453.english: Oh, come on. Don't look at me so scary.
1000610453.korean: 아이 참. 그렇게 무섭게 쳐다보지 마세요~

1000610454.english: I'm trying to guide you to a more suitable place other than this street.
1000610454.korean: 이런 길바닥 말고 좀 더 어울리는 곳으로 안내해 드리려는 거니까.

1000610456.english: Hohoho, good. Sir? You agree too, don't you? Oh, of course!
1000610456.korean: 우후후, 좋아요. 손님? 손님께서도 동의하시죠? 아, 물론!

1000610457.english: Is this course included in the entire theme park tour?
1000610457.korean: 테마파크 전체 투어에 포함되어 있는 코스랍니다?

1000610458.english: - You'll have to go through some trials along the way... but it's better to have a guide, even if it's not that bad.
1000610458.korean: - 중간에 예정된 시련을 겪어야 하겠지만... 못미더운 안내자라도 있는 게 낫겠지.

1000610459.english: Okay! Okay, then, with the guest...

1000610460.english: Um... lover? Would you like to come this way?

1000610462.english: - Even Alice fell with just one word of Circe's lip service.
1000610462.korean: - 키르케의 립서비스 단 한마디에 그 앨리스마저 함락됐다.

1000610463.english: - It feels like I'm playing right in the palm of my hand...
1000610463.korean: - 완전히 손바닥 위에서 놀아나는 기분이 드는데...

1000610464.english: Welcome to our park! Let me introduce myself again. I'm Circe, the park manager. Wow!
1000610464.korean: 저희 파크에 오신 걸 환영합니다! 다시 한 번 인사드리죠, 저는 이 파크의 관리인인 키르케라고 합니다. 와아~

1000610465.english: - Circe clapped her hands excitedly, wondering what was so enjoyable about it.
1000610465.korean: - 키르케는 뭐가 그렇게 즐거운지 혼자서 신나게 박수를 쳤다.

1000610466.english: Okay, then. Shall we start the tour right away?

1000610468.english: I'll show you a pleasure you can't even imagine.

1000610469.english: - As soon as I cut off communication with Momo and her group, Alice grabbed my hand.
1000610469.korean: - 모모 일행과의 통신을 끊자마자 앨리스가 내 손을 잡아챘다.

1000610470.english: - A face full of discontent. I can completely understand why.
1000610470.korean: - 불만이 가득한 얼굴. 그 심정은 충분히 이해가 간다.

1000610471.english: - Area A, which we headed to under Circe's guidance, was, contrary to our worries, an ordinary amusement park.
1000610471.korean: - 키르케의 안내로 향한 A 구역은 걱정과는 달리 평범한 유원지였다.

1000610473.english: It was so petty that I wanted to die.

1000610474.english: Are you talking about unimaginable pleasures with something like this?
1000610474.korean: 고작 이런 걸 가지고 상상도 못한 쾌락 운운한 건가요?

1000610475.english: Master, there's nothing more to see. Let's finish what we were doing earlier...
1000610475.korean: 주인님, 더 볼 것도 없겠어요. 아까 하던 거나... 마저 하도록 해요.

1000610476.english: Those two people holding hands over there? It's nice to see them being so sweet, but could you please look here?
1000610476.korean: 거기 손 꼬옥 잡으신 두 분? 알콩달콩한 것도 좋지만 여기를 봐주시겠어요?

1000610477.english: This is it! The pride of our park!

1000610479.english: - The roller coaster that Circe introduced was so amazing that I couldn't help but exclaim in admiration.
1000610479.korean: - 나도 모르게 감탄사를 흘릴 정도로 키르케가 소개한 롤러코스터는 훌륭했다.

1000610480.english: This 'Special Witch Illusion' was a roller coaster that was poorly designed from the start.
1000610480.korean: 이 '특급 마녀 일루젼' 은 설계부터 잘못된 롤러코스터였어요.

1000610481.english: So, she was the guy who changed the casualty record every year...
1000610481.korean: 그래서 사상자 기록을 매 년마다 갈아치우던 녀석이었었지만...

1000610482.english: Now, thanks to my passion and hard work as the manager, it has been transformed into this!
1000610482.korean: 지금은 관리인인 저의 열과 성을 다한 노력으로 이렇게 환골탈태 했답니다!

1000610483.english: By the way, the slogan is "Don't trust seat belts." Sir, would you like to take a ride?
1000610483.korean: 참고로 슬로건은 '안전띠를 믿지 마세요' 에요. 손님, 한 번 타보시겠어요?

1000610484.english: Then, it's not like it's falling behind the 'Special Witch Illusion' over there...
1000610484.korean: 그렇다면 저쪽에 '특급 마녀 일루젼'에 뒤쳐지지 않는...

1000610486.english: I looked at how far it went and it really seemed endless.
1000610486.korean: 어디까지 가나 봤더니 정말 한도 끝도 없군요.

1000610487.english: - Circe was not at all intimidated by Alice's cold voice, and still had a smiling face.
1000610487.korean: - 키르케는 앨리스의 싸늘한 목소리에도 전혀 위축되지 않고 여전히 웃는 얼굴이었다.

1000610488.english: - Alice took a step back, though her face still looked dissatisfied.
1000610488.korean: - 여전히 불만스러운 얼굴이긴 했지만 앨리스는 한 발 물러섰다.

1000610489.english: Huh? There's still more than half left?

1000610490.english: Haa, if you say that, I can't help it.
1000610490.korean: 하아, 손님께서 그렇게 말씀하시면 어쩔 수 없죠.

1000610491.english: Area B isn't that far from here. But there will be a few Metal Parasites along the way that I haven't been able to clean up.
1000610491.korean: B 구역은 여기서 그렇게 멀지 않아요. 대신 가는 길에 제가 미처 청소하지 못한 철충들이 조금 있을 거예요.

1000610492.english: - Alice, who was stepping forward with a sullen face, stopped.
1000610492.korean: - 뚱한 얼굴로 앞으로 나서던 앨리스가 멈춰섰다.

1000610493.english: Ha. Bad things really do happen at the same time.
1000610493.korean: 하. 안 좋은 일은 진짜 동시에 일어나는군요.

1000610495.english: I don't think you should be saying that, you who are acting like a fox trying to monopolize His Majesty.
1000610495.korean: 폐하를 독점하려고 여우짓이나 하는 당신이 할 말은 아니라고 생각해요.

1000610496.english: Oh my, Your Majesty~ Please wait a moment~?

1000610497.english: You can't stand it anymore and you're wagging your tail at your master... I wish you had at least half the dignity of those unnecessarily large breasts.
1000610497.korean: 그새를 못참고 주인님께 꼬리를 치다니... 그 쓸데없이 커다란 가슴의 반 만이라도 품위가 있으면 좋을텐데요.

1000610498.english: ...Do you know how shameless you are?

1000610499.english: - Charlotte and Alice are bickering again. It's not the first or second time I've seen it, and I know they don't genuinely hate each other; they're closer to being bad friends...
1000610499.korean: - 또다시 샬럿과 앨리스가 티격태격하기 시작했다. 한두번 본 것도 아니고, 진심으로 싫어하는게 아니라 악우에 가까운 관계라는 것도 알지만...

1000610500.english: - If two people with fighting power that is so strong that they are counted among the strongest in Orca start fighting each other, they will inevitably be overwhelmed by their momentum.
1000610500.korean: - 오르카에서 손에 꼽힐 정도로 강력한 전투력을 지닌 두 사람이 본격적으로 서로 쏘아붙여대면 아무래도 기세에 눌리게 된다.

1000610501.english: Hmm... Those two seem to get along really well. Here, would you like some popcorn?
1000610501.korean: 음... 저 두분은 굉장히 사이가 좋으신가봐요. 여기, 팝콘 드실래요?

1000610502.english: It's been a few years since I cooked it, but it's been perfectly preserved, so it should be fine. Probably.
1000610502.korean: 조리한지는 몇 년 지났지만 방부처리를 완벽하게 해 놨으니까 괜찮을거에요. 아마도.

1000610503.english: - Instead of popcorn, she took a candy from her pocket and put it in her mouth. I should have given it to Alice earlier...
1000610503.korean: - 팝콘 대신 주머니 속에 들어있던 사탕 하나를 꺼내 입에 물었다. 이걸 아까 앨리스한테 쥐어줬어야 했는데...

1000610504.english: What the heck are those clothes anyway? They're so vulgar I can't bear to look at them with both eyes open!
1000610504.korean: 애초에 그 옷은 대체 또 뭐죠? 도저히 두 눈 뜨고 못 봐줄 만큼 천박하군요!

1000610505.english: I just tried on the clothes because they suited me.
1000610505.korean: 제게 어울리는 의상이 있길래 입어봤을 뿐이에요.

1000610506.english: It's quite elegant, unlike that ball of string you insist is a swimsuit.
1000610506.korean: 당신이 수영복이라고 우기는 그 실뭉치와는 달리 굉장히 우아하죠.

1000610507.english: Oh, that's expensive, so once you're done wearing it, please put it back in its place.
1000610507.korean: 아, 그거 비싼거니까 다 입어보셨으면 다시 제자리에 걸어놔주세요~

1000610508.english: Where did I leave off? Right, I made churros all by myself at that snack bar about 17 years ago, right?
1000610508.korean: 어디까지 얘기했죠? 맞다, 제가 17년 전 쯤에 저기 스낵바에서 혼자 츄러스를 만들었었거든요?

1000610509.english: - As if Charlotte and Alice weren't enough, Circe, sitting next to them, kept talking nonstop, sipping liquid from her flask.
1000610509.korean: - 샬럿과 앨리스로도 모자라서 옆에 앉은 키르케는 플라스크에 담긴 액체를 홀짝이며 쉴새없이 말을 늘어놓았다.

1000610511.english: That was more fun than I thought, wasn't it? I got so absorbed in it for a whole month that I ended up making 5,000 churros... Oh my.
1000610511.korean: 그게 또 생각보다 재밌더라구요? 그래서 한 달 내내 몰두해버려서, 결국 츄러스 5천개가... 어머.

1000610512.english: We've got a lot of uninvited guests today. Were those two being too noisy?
1000610512.korean: 오늘따라 초대받지 않은 손님들이 많이 오시네요. 저 두분이 너무 시끄러웠나?

1000610513.english: Everyone~ The Metal Parasites I mentioned earlier have come out to greet you~
1000610513.korean: 여러분~ 아까 말씀드렸던 철충들이 여기까지 마중나왔어요~

1000610514.english: - Only after Circe's calm cry did Charlotte and Alice stop arguing.
1000610514.korean: - 키르케의 긴장감 없는 외침에 그제서야 샬럿과 앨리스가 다툼을 멈췄다.

1000610515.english: There's still a lot I want to say, but... let's deal with Ironworm first and then continue.
1000610515.korean: 아직 하고 싶은 말이 많지만... 일단 철충부터 처리하고 계속하죠.

1000610516.english: Yes, Your Majesty's safety is our top priority.

1000610517.english: Your Majesty~? We're going to deal with the Metal Parasites...
1000610517.korean: 폐하앙~? 저희는 철충을 처리하러 갈 건데...

1000610518.english: - Charlotte's suspicious gaze turned to Circe.

1000610519.english: Don't worry about that, Wanggasum. She's a very annoying witch, but she doesn't seem to have any bad intentions.
1000610519.korean: 그건 걱정하지 않아도돼요, 왕가슴. 굉장히 짜증나는 마녀이긴 하지만 나쁜 의도는 없는 것 같으니까.

1000610520.english: In the first place... there's no way a Bioroid could harm its owner.
1000610520.korean: 애초에... 바이오로이드가 주인님에게 해를 끼칠 수 있을리가 없죠.

1000610522.english: I'll be back soon~! Please wait patiently~.

1000610523.english: - Charlotte and Alice headed towards the place where the signal for the Metal Parasite was detected.
1000610523.korean: - 샬럿과 앨리스가 철충 신호가 잡히는 곳으로 향했다.

1000610524.english: Hmm... They're really close. I wish I had friends like that.
1000610524.korean: 음... 정말 사이좋은 분들이에요. 나도 저런 친구가 있었으면 좋겠네~

1000610525.english: Oh my, why do you say such rude things?
1000610525.korean: 어머머, 어쩜 그렇게 실례되는 말씀을 하시죠?

1000610526.english: - A deep smile suddenly appeared on Circe's lips as she was whining.
1000610526.korean: - 너스레를 떤 키르케의 입가에 돌연 진한 미소가 걸렸다.

1000610527.english: By the way, guests? Finally... there are only two left.
1000610527.korean: 그나저나 손님? 드디어... 단 둘만 남았어요.

1000610529.english: Now... shall we begin in earnest?

1000610530.english: I left a note so that those good friends don't worry, so it'll be okay, right?
1000610530.korean: 그 사이좋은 분들이 걱정하시지 않도록 메모를 남겨놨으니 괜찮겠죠?

1000610531.english: - Before your master could even retrieve the uselessly provocative note he was taking, I was already here, carried by Circe's broom.
1000610531.korean: - 당신들의 주인님은 자기가 받아간다는, 쓸데없이 도발적인 메모를 회수하기도 전에 나는 키르케의 빗자루의 실려 이곳까지 날아왔다.

1000610532.english: Okay, sir. This is Area B. You can see what kind of work we do there... right?
1000610532.korean: 자, 손님. 여기가 바로 B 구역이에요. 어떤 일을 하는 곳인지는... 보시면 아시겠죠?

1000610533.english: - As Circe said, the atmosphere here is clearly different from Area A.
1000610533.korean: - 키르케의 말대로 이곳은 A 구역과는 확연히 분위기가 다르다.

1000610534.english: - Thanks to that, I remembered my purpose that I had momentarily forgotten in the midst of the hectic development.
1000610534.korean: - 덕분에 정신없는 전개에 잠시 잊고있던 목적이 떠올랐다.

1000610535.english: - Halloween before the apocalypse. A glimpse of it can be felt in the large bed visible through the thick curtains drawn across the building's windows.
1000610535.korean: - 멸망 전의 할로윈. 건물 창문마다 드리운 두꺼운 커튼 사이로 보이는 커다란 침대에서 그 편린이 느껴진다.

1000610536.english: So, what do you think? Do you like it?

1000610537.english: You'll enjoy it even more if you have a glass of this. Okay...
1000610537.korean: 이거 한 잔 하시면 더욱 즐거워지실거에요. 자...

1000610538.english: Hehehe, then I'll take care of the guest's too...

1000610539.english: - Circe's face grew redder as she sipped the amber liquid. It was alcohol, after all.
1000610539.korean: - 호박색 액체를 홀짝이는 키르케의 얼굴이 점점 붉어졌다. 역시 술이었군.

1000610540.english: Would you like to see more of every nook and cranny?

1000610541.english: - I followed Circe, who was holding my hand, into a relatively undisturbed building.
1000610541.korean: - 내 손을 붙잡은 키르케를 따라 상대적으로 멀쩡한 건물 안으로 들어섰다.

1000610542.english: This is the reception area. Um, wait a minute. I've never served customers in this area before...
1000610542.korean: 여기가 접수처에요. 음, 잠깐만요. 이 구역에서 접객을 해본 적은 없어서...

1000610543.english: This is the waiting room... Ah, this is it!

1000610544.english: - Circe turned around in front of the long hallway, gave a strange look and shook her flask.
1000610544.korean: - 길게 이어진 복도 앞에서 뒤돌아선 키르케가 묘한 눈빛을 던지며 플라스크를 찰랑찰랑 흔들었다.

1000610545.english: Then I'll drink it for you~

1000610546.english: - Circe's eyes are slightly open as she drinks and wipes her lips.
1000610546.korean: - 술을 마시고 입가를 훔치는 키르케의 눈이 조금 풀려있다.

1000610548.english: Hahaha, you should have told me in advance~

1000610549.english: I was wondering why you were so shy, and that's why~

1000610550.english: There were certainly people with that kind of taste...
1000610550.korean: 확실히 그런 취향을 가진 분들도 계셨었죠오...

1000610552.english: - Things are finally starting to work out.

1000610553.english: - I sighed softly and turned around to leave, but something wrapped around my neck.
1000610553.korean: - 작게 한숨을 내쉬고 뒤돌아 나가는 내 목에 무언가 휘감겼다.

1000610554.english: - The sweet smell of alcohol and body heat hit me.

1000610555.english: Sir? My free trial just ended.
1000610555.korean: 손님? 방금 무료 체험 기간이 끝났어요.

1000610556.english: If I want to receive further guidance, will there be an additional cost?

1000610557.english: - I can hear Circe's small laugh whispering in my ear.
1000610557.korean: - 귓가에 작게 쿡쿡 웃는 키르케의 웃음소리가 들린다.

1000610558.english: It's nothing special. Just... just... just a little... just a little...
1000610558.korean: 별건 아니에요. 그냥... 저를 조금만... 조금만...

1000610559.english: - Circe's arm, which had been holding its breath for several times before it could speak, suddenly loosened.
1000610559.korean: - 몇 번이나 말을 꺼내려고 숨을 들이마시던 키르케의 팔이 스르르 풀렸다.

1000610560.english: ...since you're a long-time guest, here's a special treat~

1000610561.english: I'll show you around for free~ Okay, shall we go?

1000610562.english: I guess I'll have to walk since I drank~

1000610563.english: - Circe, carrying her backpack on her back and humming a tune, walks out of the building.
1000610563.korean: - 뒷짐을 지고 콧노래를 흥얼거리며 척척 건물 밖으로 나가는 키르케.

1000610564.english: - Looking at her back, I thought I knew why Circe had sent the invitation.
1000610564.korean: - 그 뒷모습을 보며 키르케가 초대장을 보낸 이유를 알 것 같았다.

1000610565.english: Hmm, hmm~! I never imagined it would be this delicious~!
1000610565.korean: 음, 흐흠~! 이렇게 맛있을 줄은 상상도 못했어요~!

1000610567.english: Yes! The parfait I just had was the best parfait I've ever had!
1000610567.korean: 네! 방금 먹은 파르페는 정말 인생 최고의 파르페였어요!

1000610569.english: I'm so glad you liked Pink Punch.
1000610569.korean: 핑크 펀치가 마음에 드셨다니 정말 다행이에요.

1000610570.english: Fur, punch... Ahaha... Something... A memory I really wanted to forget comes to mind...
1000610570.korean: 퍼, 펀치... 아하하... 뭔가... 굉장히 잊고 싶었던 기억이 떠오르네요...

1000610571.english: Ah, anyway... I'm really happy eating a parfait in this quiet Orca.
1000610571.korean: 아, 아무튼... 이렇게 조용한 오르카에서 파르페를 먹고 있으니까 정말 행복해요.

1000610572.english: The boss went to the amusement park to play, and I can spend some quiet time with the magical girls at Orca... It's like a dream.
1000610572.korean: 사장님은 유원지로 놀러 가셨고, 오르카에서 이렇게 마법소녀 분들이랑 조용히 시간을 보낼 수 있다니... 꿈만 같아요.

1000610573.english: ... Hmm... Would this be better? No. In other clothes...
1000610573.korean: ... 음... 이게 더 좋을까? 아니야. 다른 옷으로...

1000610574.english: Moonbit is busy choosing Mr. Faucre's magical costume? Should I help you out a little?
1000610574.korean: 백토는 뽀끄루 씨의 마법 복장을 골라주느라 정신이 없구나?&n내가 조금 도와줄까?

1000610575.english: Yeah, I'm fine, so don't worry about it.
1000610575.korean: 응. 난 괜찮으니까 넌 신경 쓰지 마.

1000610576.english: You're going to pick out my outfit for me... Mr. Moonbit, just looking at you makes me feel reassured, right?
1000610576.korean: 제 복장을 직접 골라 주겠다니... 정말 백토 씨는 보기만 해도 든든한 거 있죠?

1000610577.english: ... This... Wraith was too long. Moonlight's sensibility was lacking. And this...
1000610577.korean: ... 이건... 레이스가 너무 많이 달렸어. 문 라이트의 감성이 부족해.&n그리고 이건...

1000610578.english: There are still a lot of samples of Faucre's 'magic costume' left, so let's take our time looking for them.
1000610578.korean: 아직 뽀끄루 씨의 '마법 복장' 샘플은 많이 남아있으니까 천천히 찾아보자.

1000610579.english: These are the clothes that Faucre will wear, so would you like to choose them together?
1000610579.korean: 이 옷들은 뽀끄루 씨가 입을 복장이니까, 같이 한번 골라보시겠어요?

1000610581.english: Ah! I like this... I think this will do...
1000610581.korean: 아! 저는 이게 마음에 드는데... 이거면 될 것 같...

1000610582.english: Well... the design is okay... but the black and red combination is old-fashioned, so I don't really recommend it.
1000610582.korean: 음... 디자인은 괜찮은데... &n블랙, 레드 조합은 구식이라 별로 추천하고 싶지 않아.

1000610583.english: Um... Mr. Faucre is tall and slim... &n I'll look for something that emphasizes her arms and legs~!
1000610583.korean: 음... 뽀끄루 씨는 키도 크고... 날씬하시니까...&n난 팔이랑 다리를 강조하는 걸로 찾아볼게~!

1000610584.english: ... Ah! I have something good for you! Clothing that's great for activities. These are just the kind of things...
1000610584.korean: ... 아! 마침 좋은 게 있어! 활동하기 좋은 복장. 바로 이런 것들...

1000610585.english: Those, those are full-body leggings... and they're solid color... I feel like I'd get knocked out by an enemy's fist if I wore those...
1000610585.korean: 그, 그건 전신 레깅스잖아요... 게다가 단색...&n그런 걸 입었다간 왠지 적의 주먹 한방에 나가떨어질 것 같다구요...

1000610586.english: Hmm... Then how about asking the Commander? The Commander has a really good sense for that.
1000610586.korean: 음... 그럼 사령관님께 한번 여쭤보는 건 어떨까?&n사령관님이 그런 감각이 정말 뛰어나시거든.

1000610587.english: ...A gentleman? Yes! I can trust the Magic Gentleman's discerning eye.
1000610587.korean: ... 젠틀맨? 그래! 매직 젠틀맨의 안목이라면 믿을 수 있어.

1000610588.english: Really? There's really nothing you can't do, sir?
1000610588.korean: 정말요? 사장님은 정말 못하는 게 없으시네요?

1000610589.english: Yes~ You'll probably be surprised, right? Then I'll try to connect with the Commander~!
1000610589.korean: 네~ 아마 깜짝 놀라실걸요?&n그럼 제가 사령관님과 통신을 연결해 볼게요~!

1000610591.english: Magical Connect?! I, I... I want to do Magical Connect...
1000610591.korean: 매지컬 커넥트?! 저, 저도... 매지컬 커넥트... 하고 싶은데...

1000610592.english: I'm not a full-fledged magical girl yet, so please bear with me for a little longer.
1000610592.korean: 아직 정식 마법 소녀가 아니니까 조금만 참아.

1000610594.english: Oh! Commander! Excuse me... Are you busy right now?
1000610594.korean: 앗! 사령관님! 저기... 혹시 지금 바쁘세요?

1000610595.english: We're currently choosing a magical girl costume for Faucre-san, and we need your opinion, Commander.
1000610595.korean: 저희가 뽀끄루 씨의 마법 소녀 복장을 고르고 있는 중인데, &n사령관님의 의견이 필요해서요.

1000610596.english: I need a gentleman's instincts. This is my new colleague's attire. Please, please.
1000610596.korean: 젠틀맨의 본능적인 감각이 필요해. 새로운 동료의 복장이니까. 꼭 부탁해.

1000610599.english: Yes? But... these clothes... the size...

1000610601.english: Uh... communication ended... Ahaha, it seems the Commander is very busy.
1000610601.korean: 어... 통신 종료... 아하하, 사령관님이 엄청 바쁘신 것 같네요.

1000610602.english: Um... more than that... these clothes... are too... for me to wear...
1000610602.korean: 저기... 그보다도... 이 옷은... 제가 입기엔...

1000610603.english: There's no need to try to understand the grand meaning of the Magic Gentleman. We just have to believe.
1000610603.korean: 매직 젠틀맨의 큰 뜻을 굳이 이해하려 할 필요는 없어. 우린 그저 믿어야 해.

1000610604.english: Is this your outfit? Hey, Faucre? Follow me. Are you ready to transform?
1000610604.korean: 이 옷인가?&n자, 뽀끄루? 날 따라와. 변신할 준비는 됐지?

1000610605.english: Huh? You really want me to wear this? Wait a minute! Please listen to me!
1000610605.korean: 네? 진짜 이걸 입으라구요? 잠시만요! 제 말 좀 들어주세요!

1000610608.english: Why do you keep hiding? You should show it to Momo too.
1000610608.korean: 왜 자꾸 뒤로 숨는 거야? 모모에게도 보여줘야지.

1000610609.english: Have confidence. You are now a full-fledged magical girl.
1000610609.korean: 자신감을 가져. 이제 너도 어엿한 마법 소녀니까.

1000610610.english: Every, magical Faucre! Rice, transformation... complete...
1000610610.korean: 매, 매지컬 뽀끄루! 벼, 변신... 완료...

1000610611.english: ... Heehee... This outfit... is so embarrassing...

1000610612.english: Wow, really... um... pretty! &n Congratulations on officially becoming a magical girl...
1000610612.korean: 와아, 정말... 음... 예뻐요!&n저, 정식으로 마법 소녀가 되신 것을 축하드려요...

1000610613.english: ...Lies... Ugh... It feels like the button is going to fall off at any moment...
1000610613.korean: ... 거짓말... 흐윽... 단추가 금방이라도 떨어질 것 같다구요...

1000610614.english: Well, the more I look at it, the more amazing it is. This is what a true magical girl is like.
1000610614.korean: 음, 보면 볼수록 훌륭해. 진정한 마법소녀란 바로 이런 거지.

1000610615.english: Am I supposed to wear this and fight a new evil?
1000610615.korean: 저 이걸 입고 철충... 아니, 새로운 악과 싸워야 하는 건가요?

1000610616.english: I'll help you when you're having a hard time. Magical Faucre.
1000610616.korean: 네가 힘들 땐 내가 도와줄게. 매지컬 뽀끄루.

1000610618.english: Well, then... I also got Faucre-san's magic costume~.
1000610618.korean: 음, 그럼... 뽀끄루 씨의 마법 복장도 구했으니까~.

1000610619.english: Hey, Magical Girl Faucre? Would you like to go to the amusement park with us, Moonbit?
1000610619.korean: 자~ 마법소녀 뽀끄루 씨? 우리 백토랑 같이 유원지로 한번 가보실래요?

1000610620.english: Hey, you're suddenly going to an amusement park?

1000610621.english: I really wanted to teach Moonbit a lot of things when the day came that she would be with us.
1000610621.korean: 저는 백토가 우리와 함께하는 날이 오면, 정말 많은 걸 가르쳐 주고 싶었어요.

1000610622.english: The fun experiences and delicious food I've had since coming to Orca...
1000610622.korean: 제가 오르카에 온 뒤로 겪었던 즐거운 경험들, 맛있는 음식들...

1000610623.english: Moonbit has been obsessed with defeating evil so far. &n I want to teach Moonbit about the joys that still remain in the world, one by one.
1000610623.korean: 백토는 지금껏 악을 물리치는 데만 열중했거든요. &n저는 우리 백토에게 세상에 아직 남아있는 즐거움들을 하나씩 알려주고 싶어요.

1000610624.english: Uh, uh... that's a really good idea, but... my outfit...
1000610624.korean: 우, 우음... 그건 정말 좋은 생각이긴 한데... 제 복장이...

1000610625.english: How about going to an amusement park and having a sparkly Halloween party with Faucre, Moonbit, and me!
1000610625.korean: 어때요? 유원지에 가서 뽀끄루 씨랑 저랑 백토 셋이서&n반짝반짝한 할로윈 파티를 하는 거예요~!

1000610626.english: Is this our Moonbit's first Halloween festival?

1000610628.english: As expected... Moonbit, just follow me. Faucre and I will tell you what you're curious about. &n Excuse me... Faucre? Can you come with me?
1000610628.korean: 역시... 백토야, 나만 따라오면 돼. 네가 궁금한 건 나랑 뽀끄루 씨가 알려줄 테니까.&n저... 뽀끄루 씨? 같이 가주실 수 있으시죠?

1000610629.english: T, in this state? Ah... that's... Okay, wait a minute! Don't go!
1000610629.korean: 이, 이 상태로요? 아... 저 그게... 자, 잠깐만요! 가지 마세요!

1000610630.english: I can't even breathe right now...! Momo?! Moonbit?!
1000610630.korean: 지금 저 숨도 쉬기 힘들다구요...! 모모 씨?! 백토 씨?!

1000610631.english: Ugh... This, at least here's a button...

1000610632.english: Oh, Miss Neodym, that's not it!
1000610632.korean: 아이, 네오딤 아가씨. 그게 아니지 말임다!

1000610634.english: A little more like this, a black one that allows the commander to leave in one room!
1000610634.korean: 좀 더 이렇게, 사령관님이 한 방에 가버릴 수 있게 하시는 검다!

1000610636.english: It's not bad... but since you're wearing these clothes, you can show off your legs a little more...
1000610636.korean: 나쁘진 않은데... 이런 옷 입으신 김에 이렇게 다리를 좀 더...

1000610638.english: Of course not! All of Orca's countless Bioroids are working day and night to gain the Commander's favor!
1000610638.korean: 당연하지 말임다! 오르카의 수많은 바이오로이드들이 전부 사령관님의 총애를 받으려 밤낮으로 애쓰고 있지 말임다!

1000610639.english: Love is a sword that must be conquered! With that kind of mindset, you can never win back the Commander, even if you die!
1000610639.korean: 사랑은 쟁취하는검다! 그런 마음가짐으로는 죽어도 사령관님을 쟁취할 수 없지 말임다!

1000610642.english: Uh, um... even so, that's a bit much...
1000610642.korean: 어, 음... 아무리 그래도 그건 좀 그렇지 말임다...

1000610643.english: Oh, aren't you the Demon King? But, but...

1000610644.english: What on earth is going on?! Are you being bullied?! The commander will not tolerate barracks injustice!
1000610644.korean: 그 꼴은 대체 어떻게 되신검까! 괴롭힘 당하시는 검까?! 병영 부조리는 사령관님께서 용납 안하시지 말임다!

1000610646.english: These brownies, I can't contain my anger.
1000610646.korean: 이 브라우니, 분노를 참을 길이 없슴다.

1000610647.english: Who is it! Who on earth dressed the Demon King in such a ridiculous outfit!
1000610647.korean: 누구임까! 대체 누가 마왕님께 그런 되도 않는 옷을 입힌검까!

1000610648.english: Why would a grown man have to wear such a girl's outfit? It's truly vicious!
1000610648.korean: 하필이면 다 큰 어른에게 이런 소녀 복장이라니... 정말 악랄하기 짝이 없지 말임다!

1000610650.english: Heehee... Is it still a long way to go before I meet the boss?

1000610651.english: Um... this is really strange. I can't get in touch with the Commander. I think he turned off his communicator...
1000610651.korean: 음... 이건 정말 이상하네요. 사령관님과 연락이 닿질 않아요.&n통신기를 꺼놓으신 것 같은데...

1000610652.english: Yes?! Surely something didn't happen to the boss?
1000610652.korean: 네?! 설마 사장님께 무슨 일이 생기신건 아니겠죠?

1000610653.english: Hehehe, don't worry too much. Whether visible or invisible, Commander, there is always someone guarding you.
1000610653.korean: 후훗, 너무 걱정 마세요. 눈에 보이든, 보이지 않든&n사령관님 곁에는 항상 호위하는 분이 계시니까요.

1000610654.english: I'm going to take a look around, so you have to stick close to Moonbit. Got it?
1000610654.korean: 제가 한바퀴 둘러보고 올테니, 백토와 꼭~ 붙어 계셔야 해요. 아셨죠?

1000610657.english: This place... This place is quite beautiful...

1000610658.english: Oh, really? This place is so well-maintained. It's hard to believe it's a pre-apocalyptic amusement park. Whose work is this?
1000610658.korean: 네? 아, 그렇네요! 여긴 정말 관리가 잘 되어있어요. 멸망 이전의 유원지라고는&n믿기지 않을 정도로요. 어느 분들의 솜씨일까요?

1000610659.english: Oh! There's a Ferris wheel across the river! I want to go ride it... Hehe...
1000610659.korean: 앗! 저~ 쪽 강 건너편에 관람차가 있어요! 타러 가고싶네요... 헤헤...

1000610660.english: I think you didn't want to come when you were in Orca... I guess you've changed your mind.
1000610660.korean: 오르카에 있을땐 오기 싫어했던 것 같은데... 생각이 바뀌었나보군.

1000610661.english: Mr. Moonbit is right. Oh, I'm still embarrassed about the clothes... but I guess I hesitated for nothing. I never imagined it would be such a cool and fun place.
1000610661.korean: 백토 씨 말이 맞아요. 오, 옷은 여전히 부끄럽지만... 괜히 망설였던 것 같아요.&n이렇게 멋지고 재밌는 곳이라고는 생각도 못했거든요.

1000610663.english: Huh? Is there anything on the shelf?

1000610664.english: What, what is this...? Why... &n Are moonlight waves emanating from these clothes?
1000610664.korean: 이, 이건...? 어째서...&n이 옷에서 월광의 파동이 뿜어져 나오고 있는거지?

1000610665.english: Ah~! You mean this outfit? Moonlight Wave... I don't really know about that either... &n I'll read the advertising copy.
1000610665.korean: 아~! 이 옷 말인가요? 월광의 파동... 은 저도 잘 모르겠지만...&n광고 문구를 읽어볼게요.

1000610666.english: Sale... Hyper Crimson Hood... A chance to unleash an even more powerful...
1000610666.korean: 세일... 하이퍼 크림슨 후드... 한층 강력해진... 를 발산할 수 있는 기회...

1000610667.english: Give your precious... Bioroid... a powered-up cape... &n A full moon at the amusement park... Protect yourself from the wolf attacks?
1000610667.korean: 당신의 소중한.... 바이오로이드... 에게... 파워 업된 망토를... &n보름달이 뜬 유원지...늑대들의 공격으로 부터... 몸을 지켜라?

1000610668.english: Well, it's kind of hard to pinpoint a selling point. Hehe...
1000610668.korean: 음, 뭔가 세일즈 포인트를 잡기 힘드네요. 헤헤...

1000610669.english: Magical Faucre? What kind of festival was Halloween?
1000610669.korean: 매지컬 뽀끄루? 할로윈이 어떤 축제라고 했지?

1000610670.english: Yeah? Halloween is... well... a festival where people dress up in fun costumes and get simple snacks and stuff.
1000610670.korean: 응? 할로윈은... 그러니까... 인간님들이 재밌는 복장을 하고, 간단한 간식같은걸&n얻는 축제래요.

1000610671.english: I'm sorry... I don't remember exactly.

1000610672.english: So... I don't know exactly what this cloak is, but it means I have to wear it and get a snack from the Magic Gentleman... Well, I actually want to talk to the Magic Gentleman...
1000610672.korean: 그렇다면... 이 망토가 정확하게 뭔진 모르겠지만, 이걸 입고 매직 젠틀맨에게&n간식을 얻으면 된다는 뜻이군... 저, 정확히는 매직 젠틀맨과 대화를 하고 싶은 것이지만...

1000610673.english: Hehehe, yes! If it were the boss, he would definitely think of Mr. Moonbit as cute.
1000610673.korean: 후훗, 네! 사장님이라면 분명 백토 씨를 귀엽게 봐주실 거에요.

1000610674.english: Oh, no. I made a mistake...

1000610675.english: Anyway. Magical Faucre, I'll go get some clothes from the store and come out, so wait here. It's too dangerous for a beginner magical girl to act alone.
1000610675.korean: 아무튼. 매지컬 뽀끄루, 나는 가게에서 옷을 챙겨 입고 나올테니 여기서 기다리고 있어.&n초보 매지컬 소녀가 단독 행동을 하는건 너무 위험해.

1000610676.english: Yes? But... I think there's a store owner here... If you just take the clothes like that...
1000610676.korean: 네? 그래도... 여긴 가게 주인이 있을 것 같은데... 그렇게 옷을 막 가져가시면...

1000610678.english: I can't help it... I don't have the currency I used before... &n Here... I'll leave a few of my trinkets here, so please take a look, shop owner...
1000610678.korean: 어쩔 수 없네요... 예전에 쓰던 화폐는 없지만... &n여기... 제 장신구를 몇 개 놔둘테니 가게 주인님도 조금만 봐주세요...

1000610679.english: Please take good care of our Moonbit....

1000610681.english: Moonlight! Magical power up! I can definitely feel the power overflowing!
1000610681.korean: 문 라이트! 매지컬 파워 업! 확실히... 힘이 넘쳐흐르는 게 느껴지는군!!

1000610683.english: Hey, are you sure you're wearing the exact same outfit that the mannequin was wearing?!
1000610683.korean: 서, 설마 저 마네킹이 걸치고 있던 복장을 그대로 따라 입은건가요?!

1000610685.english: Aren't you a little cold?! No, no! Don't you think it's a little strange that I'm only wearing a cloak?!
1000610685.korean: 좀 춥지 않으세요?! 아니 아니!&n망토만 두르고 있는 상황이 뭔가 이상하다고 생각되지 않나요?!

1000610686.english: Listening to it, I feel a little empty...

1000610687.english: ...No, this outfit...is perfect just the way it is! I feel a trembling like I've never felt before!
1000610687.korean: ...아냐, 이 복장은... 이대로 완벽해! 지금껏 느껴보지 못한 강한 떨림이 느껴져!

1000610688.english: That can't be true! That's just... that, that's just a so-so costume!
1000610688.korean: 그럴리가 없잖아요! 그건 그냥... 그, 그렇고그런 코스츔이잖아요!

1000610689.english: You're my sisters, right? Hello, sisters?

1000610690.english: Oh! Ladies, what are those clothes? They're so bold!
1000610690.korean: 오오! 언니들, 그 옷 뭐야뭐야? 정말 대담한데!

1000610692.english: Nice to see you, Doctor. You're always so cheerful and nice to see.
1000610692.korean: 반가워, 닥터. 넌 늘 활기차서 보기 좋아.

1000610693.english: I appreciate the compliment... Phew, but why do you two have so few clothes? Did you two just share one piece of clothing?
1000610693.korean: 칭찬은 고마운데... 푸흡, 그런데 언니들 옷이 왜 그렇게 모자라?&n옷 하나 가지고 둘이서 나눠 입은거야?

1000610695.english: Well, okay. You want to dress up like that and seduce your brother?
1000610695.korean: 뭐, 좋아. 그렇게 야시시하게 입고 오빠를 유혹하겠다?

1000610696.english: The Dr. Jjuk Jjuk Bang Bang project is almost finished, so it would be good for you ladies to start getting nervous!
1000610696.korean: 쭉쭉빵빵 닥터 프로젝트도 이제 거의 완성 단계니까 언니들도 슬슬 긴장하는게 좋을거야!

1000610697.english: Hmm... Doctor, what is that in your hand...?

1000610698.english: This? Hehe... I managed to get the last piece of the growth potion from the witch a little while ago!
1000610698.korean: 이거? 히히... 아까전에 마녀 언니한테서 성장약의 마지막 조각을 얻는데 성공했거든-!

1000610699.english: I can't lose either. If only I could just have this leap in growth... my brother... hehe...
1000610699.korean: 나도 질수 없지. 이 성장의 비약만 있으면... 우리 오빠를... 이히히...

1000610700.english: Sisters? Then I have to go first because I have to do some experimenting quickly! Happy Halloween~!
1000610700.korean: 언니들? 그럼 난 빨리 실험해 봐야 되니까 먼저 갈게! 해피 할로윈~!

1000610701.english: ...a growth potion...I wish I were a little shorter...
1000610701.korean: ... 성장이 가능한 약이라니... 저는 키가 조금 더 작았으면 좋겠는데...

1000610702.english: Phew~! I'm back. The Commander said it's okay to play here as long as you don't go too deep.
1000610702.korean: 휴~! 저 돌아왔어요. 사령관님께서 너무 깊숙한 곳만 가지 않으면&n이곳에서 놀아도 괜찮다고 하셨어요.

1000610704.english: Uh... Moonbit? What happened to those clothes?
1000610704.korean: 어... 백토야? 그 옷은... 어떻게 된거니?

1000610705.english: Heh, thanks to this outfit, I've earned the right to receive candy from the Magic Gentleman.
1000610705.korean: 훗, 난 이 복장 덕분에 매직 젠틀맨에게 사탕을 받을 자격을 얻었어.

1000610706.english: And I fully accepted the new power to fight against evil.
1000610706.korean: 그리고 악에 맞서 싸울 새로운 힘도 온전히 내것으로 받아들였지.

1000610707.english: Momo, please say something...! Moonbit, you're going to catch a cold...
1000610707.korean: 모모 씨, 뭐라고 말 좀 해주세요...! 백토 씨 감기 걸리겠어요...

1000610708.english: Moonbit, you're enjoying Halloween in your own way, aren't you? Yeah, that's right. It's nice to see you, Moonbit...
1000610708.korean: 배, 백토도 나름대로 할로윈을 즐기는거구나? 응, 맞아. 보기 좋아, 백토야...
