1000610709.english: Hmm... there's a carousel over there? Hehe, shall we go together? It's Halloween!
1000610709.korean: 음... 저기 회전 목마가 있네요? 헤헤, 같이 가 볼까요? 할로윈이니까요!

1000610710.korean: 모모 씨! 제 눈을 피하지 마세요!

1000610711.english: Wow, the sky is so clear! The moonlight is surging.
1000610711.korean: 우와, 하늘이 참 맑네요? 문 라이트의 기운이 샘솟고 있어요.

1000610712.english: Momo... Haa... Mr. Moonbit, aren't you really cold? If you keep doing that, you'll catch a cold...
1000610712.korean: 모모 씨... 하아...&n백토 씨, 정말 안 추워요? 그러다간 감기...

1000610714.english: Cold, huh? Not at all! The descendants of the Moon people can't stand this cold... Whew!
1000610714.korean: 추위 말인가? 전혀! 월인의 후손은 이정도 추위는... 엣취!

1000610715.english: Phew... Our magical girl seniors' thoughts are truly unpredictable...
1000610715.korean: 휴우... 우리 마법 소녀 선배님들의 생각은 정말 종잡을 수가 없네요...

1000610716.english: I've been through a lot of things as the youngest... in the past... huh...
1000610716.korean: 막내 생활은... 예전에 많이 했는데... 히잉...

1000610717.english: Okay, Mr. Moonbit. Huh, do it.

1000610718.english: - A quiet bridge. I looked away from the terminal and stretched, my joints screaming.
1000610718.korean: - 조용한 함교. 단말에서 눈을 떼고 기지개를 켜자 관절이 비명을 질렀다.

1000610719.english: - Even in a destroyed world, time passes.

1000610720.english: - With the end of the year approaching, perhaps they had gone off to take a break; Cheol-chung showed no signs of activity.
1000610720.korean: - 연말을 맞아 쉬러가기라도 한 거지, 철충은 별다른 움직임이 없었다.

1000610721.english: - That was fortunate, but as a commander in charge of numerous Bioroids, there was a mountain of work to do.
1000610721.korean: - 그건 다행이었지만, 수많은 바이오로이드들을 책임지고 있는 사령관으로서 할 일은 산더미였다.

1000610722.english: - The various payment documents that keep pouring in are endless, no matter how much I process them.
1000610722.korean: - 밀려들어오는 각종 결재서류들은 처리해도 처리해도 끝이 없다.

1000610723.english: - Even if it's not something that's particularly important, the commanders handle it, and yet it's like this...
1000610723.korean: - 그나마도 웬만큼 중요한 것 아니면 지휘관들 선에서 처리해주는데도 이정도라니...

1000610724.english: - Just as I was about to loosen my stiff neck and start working again, someone approached me.
1000610724.korean: - 굳어버린 목을 대충 풀고 다시 일을 시작하려는 순간 누군가가 다가왔다.

1000610725.english: Master, you look very tired. Why don't you rest for a bit?
1000610725.korean: 주인님, 많이 피곤해 보이시는데 조금 쉬시는 게 어때요?

1000610727.english: As far as I can tell, having watched you continuously, Master.
1000610727.korean: 주인님을 계속 봐 온 제가 알 수 있는 정도로는요.

1000610728.english: - Constantia looked at the letters that filled the terminal and sighed.
1000610728.korean: - 콘스탄챠가 단말을 빽빽하게 채운 글자들을 들여다보고 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000610729.english: You don't have to worry about it this much...

1000610730.english: If you're sorry, please go to your room and rest. I'll take care of the rest.
1000610730.korean: 미안하시면 방에 가서 쉬어주세요. 나머지는 제가 할게요.

1000610731.english: - I was about to reflexively say that it was okay, but I swallowed my words when I saw Constantia's worried expression.
1000610731.korean: - 반사적으로 괜찮다고 말하려다 콘스탄챠의 걱정스러운 표정에 말을 삼켰다.

1000610734.english: - I held back a yawn and headed to the captain's cabin.

1000610735.english: - When I decided to rest, I started missing my bed and my steps quickened on their own.
1000610735.korean: - 막상 쉬려고 마음 먹으니 침대가 그리워져 걸음이 저절로 빨라졌다.

1000610737.english: - I walked down the hallway, greeting the members as usual.
1000610737.korean: - 평소처럼 대원들의 인사를 받아주며 복도를 걸었다.

1000610738.english: - After taking a quick breather in the room, I decided what to do next...
1000610738.korean: - 방에서 잠깐 한숨 돌렸다가 다음에 해야할 일이...

1000610739.english: - Ah, I should contact Khan, who went on reconnaissance, to see if there was anything unusual.
1000610739.korean: - 아, 정찰나간 칸에게 특이사항이 있는지 연락해봐야겠군.

1000610740.english: - And also, preparing gifts for the hard-working members...
1000610740.korean: - 거기다 고생한 대원들을 위한 선물 준비도...

1000610743.english: - The Bioroid that resembles the doctor passes me and greets the other agents.
1000610743.korean: - 닥터를 닮은 바이오로이드는 나를 지나쳐 다른 대원들에게 인사를 건네고 있다.

1000610744.english: - The voice seems to have changed subtly, but that... braided hair is definitely...
1000610744.korean: - 목소리는 미묘하게 달라진 것 같지만 저... 땋은 머리는 분명...

1000610746.english: - The Bioroid that looked back and smiled slyly was clearly the doctor.
1000610746.korean: - 돌아보며 능청스럽게 미소짓는 바이오로이드는 분명히 닥터였다.

1000610747.english: - I feel like I've grown by about 10 years...?

1000610748.english: What's wrong? Why did you call me... Ugh.
1000610748.korean: 무슨 일 있어? 왜 불러놓고... 풉.

1000610751.english: - The doctor spread her arms as if to show off. Thanks to that, the clothes that had barely been hanging around her waist were rolled up...
1000610751.korean: - 닥터가 보란듯이 팔을 펼쳤다. &n덕분에 간신히 허리에 걸쳐있던 옷이 말려올라가고...

1000610756.english: - You have to run away. If you listen any longer, you'll definitely end up in a dangerous situation.
1000610756.korean: - 도망쳐야 해. 더이상 들었다간 위험한 상황에 처할 것이 분명하다.

1000610757.english: - I felt sorry for the doctor, but I cut her off mid-sentence and hurried on.
1000610757.korean: - 닥터에겐 미안하지만 말을 도중에 끊고 서둘러 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000610758.english: - I tried to ignore the ominous sound of slippers following me behind and arrived at the captain's cabin.
1000610758.korean: - 등 뒤에서 따라오는 불길한 슬리퍼 소리를 애써 무시하며 함장실에 도착했다.

1000610759.english: - When I opened the door, instead of the familiar captain's cabin, I found a cozy and fluffy-looking room...
1000610759.korean: - 문을 열자 익숙한 함장실 대신 아늑하고 폭신해보이는 방이...

1000610760.english: - The doctor came up behind me as I stood there dumbfounded from the continuous shock.
1000610760.korean: - 연속된 충격에 멍하니 서있는 내 뒤로 닥터가 다가왔다.

1000610762.english: The design was done by me and my older sister Fortune, but Constantia and the other older sisters also helped a lot?
1000610762.korean: 설계는 나랑 포츈 언니가 했지만, 콘스탄챠 언니랑 다른 언니들도 많이 도와줬다?

1000610763.english: Hehehe, are you touched? You were touched! Then... huh?

1000610764.english: - The doctor's eyes widened as she stroked her head.

1000610765.english: - A room decorated with a year-end winter festival atmosphere.

1000610766.english: - The sincerity is conveyed in the decorations that are meticulously filled in every nook and cranny.
1000610766.korean: - 구석구석까지 꼼꼼하게 채워진 장식에서 정성이 전해진다.

1000610768.english: Big Brother, Big Brother. Come in quickly. Isn't this sofa really soft?
1000610768.korean: 오빠, 오빠. 얼른 들어와봐. 이 소파 엄청 푹신푹신하다?

1000610769.english: - As soon as I was led by the hand and laid down on the sofa, the doctor sat on my lap as if it were natural.
1000610769.korean: - 손을 이끌려 소파에 몸을 묻자마자 닥터는 당연하다는듯이 내 무릎위에 앉았다.

1000610770.english: - I feel dizzy from the weight and scent that are completely different from before.
1000610770.korean: - 예전과는 전혀 다른 무게감과 향기에 정신이 아찔해진다.

1000610772.english: - The doctor leaned against me, so I quickly pulled my butt deeper into the sofa.
1000610772.korean: - 닥터가 몸을 기대오는 바람에 급히 엉덩이를 소파 깊숙히 당겼다.

1000610773.english: - I asked cautiously and examined the doctor’s body.

1000610774.english: - If it were possible to grow a Bioroid's skeleton this easily, it would be a tremendous discovery, but the doctor didn't seem to care.
1000610774.korean: - 이렇게 간단하게 바이오로이드의 골격을 성장시킬 수 있다면 어마어마한 대발견일텐데도 정작 닥터는 대수롭지 않아보였다.

1000610775.english: Not all. It's still a bit unstable, and it's difficult to mass-produce...
1000610775.korean: 다는 아니야. 아직 조금 불안정하기도 하고, 양산하기도 어렵고...

1000610776.english: This time, I did it myself because it was urgent, but it still needs to go through more clinical trials.
1000610776.korean: 이번엔 급해서 내가 직접 했지만 임상실험도 더 거쳐야 해.

1000610777.english: - The doctor, who had suddenly become a doctor, began to explain in detail.
1000610777.korean: - 어느새 박사님 모드가 된 닥터가 줄줄 설명을 늘어놓았다.

1000610778.english: Actually, we already have the technology to grow our skeletons... or should we say, replace them?
1000610778.korean: 사실 우리들의 골격을 성장... 이라고 할까, 교체하는 기술은 이미 있잖아?

1000610779.english: But the process is complicated, expensive, and takes a long time, so I tried to simplify it a bit.
1000610779.korean: 그런데 공정이 복잡하고 비싼데다 오래걸리기까지 하니까 그걸 좀 간소화 해 본거야.

1000610781.english: I'm thinking of trying different flavors to suit your taste. This time, it was strawberry, and it was better than I expected.
1000610781.korean: 맛도 취향별로 준비해 볼 생각이야. 이번엔 딸기 맛이었는데 음, 생각보다 괜찮았어.

1000610782.english: - The doctor explains with shining eyes.

1000610783.english: - In the past, it would have been just cute, but now it has a strong intellectual aura.
1000610783.korean: - 예전같았으면 귀엽기만 했겠지만 지금은 지적인 아우라가 팍팍 느껴진다.

1000610786.english: - I stopped my hand from pinching the doctor's cheek as usual while she was smiling bashfully.
1000610786.korean: - 배시시 웃는 닥터의 볼을 평소처럼 꼬집으려다 손을 멈췄다.

1000610787.english: - I'm so self-conscious about just a change in appearance...

1000610789.english: Oh, right. It's for you, and it's for us. Hints are over!
1000610789.korean: 아, 그래. 오빠를 위한 일이기도 하고, 우리를 위한 일이기도 해. 힌트 끝!

1000610791.english: - A sense of crisis comes over me again as I see the doctor smiling meaningfully.
1000610791.korean: - 의미심장하게 웃는 닥터를 보고 또다시 위기감이 엄습한다.

1000610792.english: - I managed to divert her attention a little while ago, but the area of ​​contact between the doctor and my body is gradually increasing.
1000610792.korean: - 조금전엔 어떻게든 관심을 돌려놓는 데 성공했지만, 점점 닥터와 내 몸의 접촉 면적이 증가하고 있다.

1000610793.english: - I was desperately trying to think of another topic when a good idea suddenly came to me.
1000610793.korean: - 필사적으로 다른 화제를 떠올리다 문득 좋은 생각이 떠올랐다.

1000610795.english: - The doctor, who had been turning her body and looking up at me, blinked.
1000610795.korean: - 몸을 틀어 나를 올려다보던 닥터가 눈을 깜빡였다.

1000610797.english: - The doctor asks with genuine concern, but it doesn't seem like she's joking.
1000610797.korean: - 진심으로 걱정스럽게 묻는 닥터는 농담하는 것처럼은 보이지 않는다.

1000610799.english: You still believe in Santa Claus? You must have a bit of an innocent side to you, Big Brother.
1000610799.korean: 아직도 산타클로스를 믿다니, 오빠도 은근히 순진한 구석이 있네?

1000610800.english: - Perhaps because she was a scientist, the doctor was realistic in a strange way.
1000610800.korean: - 과학자라서 그런지, 닥터는 묘한 곳에서 현실적이었다.

1000610801.english: I don't have time to fantasize about that, but with the doctor...

1000610802.english: - Fortunately, a communication came in at the same time as the doctor's two arms wrapped around my neck.
1000610802.korean: - 닥터의 두 팔이 내 목을 휘감음과 동시에 다행히도 통신이 들어왔다.

1000610803.english: Commander, during a routine reconnaissance mission, the situation...
1000610803.korean: 사령관, 통상 정찰 임무 수행 도중 상황이...

1000610806.english: - Khan nodded nervously as the doctor, who was sitting on my lap, greeted me cheerfully.
1000610806.korean: - 내 무릎에 떡하니 자리 잡은 닥터가 명랑하게 인사하자 칸이 떨떠름하게 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000610807.english: During reconnaissance, an unidentified flying object was detected crashing. Smoke rising from the crash site was visible to the naked eye.
1000610807.korean: 정찰 도중 미확인 비행체가 추락하는 것을 감지했다. &n추락 현장에서 피어오르는 연기를 육안으로 식별 가능한 상태다.

1000610808.english: No iron signals are detected from the aircraft.
1000610808.korean: 해당 비행체에서 철충 신호는 감지되지 않는다.

1000610809.english: However, the Metal Parasites that were scattered nearby are all approaching the crash site.
1000610809.korean: 다만, 근처에 흩어져 있던 철충들이 일제히 추락 현장으로 접근중이다.

1000610810.english: This reconnaissance party appears to be capable of dealing with the situation on their own. Instructions...
1000610810.korean: 본 정찰대가 자력으로 상대할 수 있는 수준으로 보인다. 지시를...

1000610811.english: Oh, Captain! It's been a while since I've spoken to the Commander, and you're being so stiff?
1000610811.korean: 아아, 대장! 얼마만에 사령관이랑 얘기하는 건데 그렇게 딱딱하게 할 거야?

1000610813.english: That idiot was making a fuss and ended up in a snow hole, so I'm drying her clothes and gear.
1000610813.korean: 그 바보는 촐싹대다가 눈구덩이에 빠지는 바람에 옷이랑 장비 말리고 있어.

1000610814.english: Should I call you? War Wolf! Come here!

1000610815.english: Hey, hey! Get dressed! I'm talking to the commander!
1000610815.korean: 앗, 야! 옷은 입고 와! 사령관이랑 통신 중이란 말이야!

1000610817.english: - A smile appeared on Khan's lips as she looked at her subordinates while saying that.
1000610817.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 부하들을 바라보는 칸의 입꼬리엔 미소가 걸려 있다.

1000610818.english: Hmm, back to the topic. The Iron Insect forces in this area can be dealt with by our own scouting party.
1000610818.korean: 흠, 이야기를 되돌리지. 이 구역의 철충 세력은 본 정찰대가 자력으로 상대할 수 있다.

1000610819.english: It's not that far to the crash site, so it might be a good idea to check.
1000610819.korean: 추락 지점까지 거리도 멀지 않으니 확인해보는 것이 좋을 것 같다.

1000610820.english: Then, we'll immediately clear out the nearby Metal Parasites and head to the crash site. That's all.
1000610820.korean: 그럼 바로 근처 철충들을 소탕하며 추락 현장으로 향하겠다. 이상.

1000610821.english: - Unlike Khan, who has been through a lot since before the fall, Quick Camel and War Wolf are probably not used to this kind of terrain.
1000610821.korean: - 멸망 전부터 산전수전을 다 겪어온 칸과는 달리 퀵 카멜과 워울프는 이런 지형엔 익숙하지 않겠지.

1000610824.english: There's no need to worry. The Commander has a point.
1000610824.korean: 마음 쓸 필요 없다. 사령관의 말도 일리가 있군.

1000610825.english: Then, please lead the way. Shall we begin right away?

1000610826.english: That was a great performance, Commander.

1000610827.english: ...This reconnaissance team will now head to the crash site. That's all.

1000610828.english: - As soon as the call ended, the doctor, who had been sitting on the sofa swinging her legs, quickly climbed back onto my lap.
1000610828.korean: - 통신이 종료되자 그동안 소파에 앉아 달랑달랑 다리를 흔들고 있던 닥터가 냉큼 다시 무릎 위로 올라왔다.

1000610829.english: Big Brother, why did you suddenly say you wanted to be Santa Claus?
1000610829.korean: 오빠, 그런데 왜 갑자기 산타클로스가 되겠다는 말을 한 거야?

1000610830.english: - From the time I came to my senses in the ruins until now... &n

1000610831.english: - I don't remember anything other than combat knowledge, so I wouldn't have been able to do anything if it weren't for the Orca members.
1000610831.korean: - 전투 지식 외엔 아무 것도 기억하지 못하는 난 오르카 대원들이 아니었다면 아무것도 할 수 없었겠지.

1000610832.english: - No, I think I wouldn't have been alive in the first place.
1000610832.korean: - 아니, 애초에 지금까지 살아있지도 못했을거란 생각이 든다.

1000610833.english: - I slowly put into words the thoughts that were only in my head.
1000610833.korean: - 머릿속에만 있었던 생각들을 천천히 말로 옮겼다.

1000610834.english: - As I talked about the things I was grateful for and the things that made me happy, the doctor's eyes started to sparkle more and more.
1000610834.korean: - 지금까지 고마웠던 일들, 기뻤던 일들을 하나씩 얘기할 때마다 닥터의 눈이 점점 초롱초롱해졌다.

1000610838.english: - The doctor, with her back straight, raised her index finger.
1000610838.korean: - 등을 세운 닥터가 검지손가락을 척 치켜세웠다.

1000610839.english: First of all, of course, you'll need things to give as gifts, and if you're having a party, you'll need food and decorations...
1000610839.korean: 일단 당연히 선물 할만한 것들이 필요할거고, 파티를 하려면 먹을거랑 장식에...

1000610840.english: I'll have to move secretly... Ah, that seems like it'll work.
1000610840.korean: 몰래 움직여야할 테니까... 아, 그건 될 것 같고.

1000610841.english: To move the luggage... Are there any leftover backpacks that the Silky sisters use?
1000610841.korean: 짐을 옮기려면... 실키 언니들이 쓰는 배낭 남은 게 있던가?

1000610842.english: - The doctor was already lost in her own world.
1000610842.korean: - 닥터는 어느새 자기만의 세상에 푹 빠져있었다.

1000610843.english: - I've often seen you talking to yourself and organizing your thoughts, but seeing you grow up so much brings back new memories.
1000610843.korean: - 혼잣말을 하며 생각을 정리하는 모습은 자주 봐왔지만, 이렇게 훌쩍 자란 모습으로 보니 감회가 새롭다.

1000610845.english: That city last time... Huh? Why?

1000610846.english: - There are many members of Orca who walk around in outfits that go beyond imagination.
1000610846.korean: - 오르카엔 상상을 초월하는 차림으로 돌아다니는 대원들이 많다.

1000610847.english: - I thought I was used to that kind of visual stimulation, but I was sorely mistaken...
1000610847.korean: - 그런 시각적 자극엔 익숙해졌다고 생각했었지만, 크나큰 착각이었군...

1000610848.english: - The doctor's current appearance is very detrimental to my mental health.
1000610848.korean: - 지금 닥터의 모습은 내 정신건강에 몹시 해롭다.

1000610849.english: But I still haven't found the right clothes. Audrey said she's busy too...
1000610849.korean: 그치만 아직 맞는 옷을 못구했단 말이야. 오드리 언니도 바쁘다고 하구...

1000610851.english: - The doctor grabbed the hem of her gown and shook it. ...Oh my goodness, Orca.
1000610851.korean: - 닥터가 가운자락을 잡고 팔락팔락 흔들었다. ...오르카 맙소사.

1000610853.english: Big Brother, you said you would love me when I grow up!
1000610853.korean: 오빠, 내가 어른이 되면 사랑해준다고 했었잖아!

1000610854.english: - Before I could finish speaking, the doctor turned around.
1000610854.korean: - 말을 끝내기도 전에 닥터가 몸을 빙글 돌렸다.

1000610855.english: - The doctor looks at me with her lips pouting.
1000610855.korean: - 입술을 삐죽 내밀고 나를 바라보는 닥터.

1000610857.english: - I gently stroked the doctor's hair, which was still messy.
1000610857.korean: - 여전히 토라져있는 닥터의 머리카락을 살살 쓰다듬었다.

1000610860.english: Well then... I can't help it...

1000610861.english: But after this is over, you have to love me, okay?
1000610861.korean: 그래도 이거 끝나면 꼭 사랑해 줘야 해. 알았지?

1000610863.english: - The doctor grabbed my hand and hooked our little fingers together.
1000610863.korean: - 닥터가 멋대로 내 손을 잡고 새끼손가락을 걸었다.

1000610864.english: But Big Brother, are you okay?

1000610865.english: My brother has other things to do, and he'll have to go out a lot to get presents and prepare for parties...
1000610865.korean: 오빠는 다른 일도 많구, 또 선물구하고 파티준비하려면 많이 돌아다녀야 될텐데...

1000610866.english: - I stroked the worried doctor's head again.

1000610867.english: Yeah... If it's okay with you, then I can't help it...
1000610867.korean: 으응... 오빠가 괜찮다면 어쩔 수 없지...

1000610868.english: Okay, let's get started! There's a lot to prepare!
1000610868.korean: 그럼 바로 시작하자! 준비할 게 많으니까!

1000610869.english: - The doctor disappeared into the hallway and let out a deep sigh. "Good job..."
1000610869.korean: - 닥터가 복도로 사라지고 깊은 한숨을 토해냈다. 잘 넘겼어...

1000610870.english: - It's fortunate that the doctor, although she looks grown up on the outside, is still an innocent child on the inside.
1000610870.korean: - 겉모습은 자랐어도 속은 순진한 아이인 닥터 그대로라 다행이다.

1000610872.english: - I tried to get up without thinking and ended up sitting down again.

1000610875.english: - While the agents were decorating the room and rearranging the items, I was a bit lost when a knock came.
1000610875.korean: - 대원들이 방을 꾸며주면서 물건들의 배치가 바뀌는 바람에 조금 헤매는 사이에 노크소리가 울렸다.

1000610877.english: Today I will serve you, Commander.

1000610878.english: - From her appearance, to her clothes, to her position... no matter how you look at it, Feather seems far from being secretive.
1000610878.korean: - 외모, 복장, 보직까지... 아무리봐도 페더는 은밀함과는 거리가 있어보인다.

1000610879.english: Haha, don't worry. There's a way.
1000610879.korean: 후후, 걱정 마세요. 다 방법이 있답니다.

1000610880.english: If you're ready, shall we go?

1000610881.english: - I followed Feather and... I entered a small crevice somewhere in Orca.
1000610881.korean: - 페더를 따라온 나는... 오르카 어딘가에 있는 작은 틈새에 들어와있다.

1000610882.english: - In the pitch-black darkness, only the outline of Feather's face is barely visible.
1000610882.korean: - 칠흙같은 어둠 속에서 페더의 얼굴 윤곽만이 간신히 보인다.

1000610883.english: Wait a minute. Hehehe, huh huh huh...

1000610884.english: - Little by little, my eyes adjust to the darkness. And... the walls are densely covered with... pictures...?
1000610884.korean: - 조금씩 눈이 어둠에 익숙해진다. 그리고... 벽을 빽빽히 메운... 사진...?

1000610885.english: - Most of the photos show Khan.
1000610885.korean: - 사진들은 대부분 칸의 모습을 담고 있다.

1000610886.english: - From photos that appear to have been taken from the sky during a mission to photos of people changing clothes in their quarters...
1000610886.korean: - 임무 수행중에 상공에서 찍은 것 같아보이는 사진부터 숙소에서 옷을 갈아입는...

1000610887.english: - Wait a minute, is this angle possible?
1000610887.korean: - 잠깐만, 이런 각도가 나올 수가 있나?

1000610888.english: Hehehe... Let me just organize this... It's Captain Khan...

1000610889.english: You're always so cool... Haa, I wish I could get together with the Commander soon... Hot.
1000610889.korean: 언제나 너무 멋있으셔... 하아, 빨리 사령관님이랑 맺어졌으면... 핫.

1000610890.english: Oh, Commander. Sorry, you kept me waiting.

1000610891.english: Oh, thank you. Then I will explain.

1000610892.english: Here we will check the dynamics inside the Orca and move it.
1000610892.korean: 여기서 오르카 내부의 동태를 확인하고 움직일 거예요.

1000610893.english: Oh, that's my hobby. Isn't our Khan Captain really cool?
1000610893.korean: 아, 그건 제 취미생활이에요. 저희 칸 대장님, 정말 멋있지 않나요?

1000610894.english: She has a dignified appearance on the battlefield, is kind in everyday life, and surprisingly playful...
1000610894.korean: 전장에서의 늠름한 모습하며, 평상시에는 자상하시고, 의외로 장난기도 있으시고...

1000610896.english: Oh, don't get me wrong. I'm not looking at you as a love interest or anything.
1000610896.korean: 아, 오해하지는 마세요. 대장님을 연애대상으로 보거나 하는 건 아니니까요.

1000610898.english: - Manipulated the panel that Feather was holding.

1000610899.english: I haven't printed it out yet, but I've been taking more pictures of the Commander than Captain Khan lately.
1000610899.korean: 아직 출력은 못 했지만, 요샌 칸 대장님보다 사령관님을 더 많이 찍고 있답니다.

1000610900.english: - What came to mind on the panel were photos of me taken in various places and from various angles.
1000610900.korean: - 패널에 떠오른건 여러 장소, 여러 각도에서 찍은 내 사진이었다.

1000610901.english: - I snatched the panel from Feather's hand without realizing it.
1000610901.korean: - 나도 모르게 페더의 손에서 패널을 빼앗아 들었다.

1000610903.english: Haha, this photo turned out well, didn't it? Constantia looks happy too...
1000610903.korean: 후후, 이사진 잘 찍혔죠? 콘스탄챠님도 즐거워 보이시구...

1000610904.english: - The captain's quarters before the crew decorated it... the bed... the camera angle...
1000610904.korean: - 대원들이 꾸며주기 전의 함장실... 침대... 카메라 앵글...

1000610905.english: - I felt a headache and pressed my temples.

1000610906.english: - The identity of the 'teacher' that Brownie was talking about has finally been revealed.

1000610907.english: Would you like me to print one for you? It's an old-fashioned way, but it has its own charm.
1000610907.korean: 한 장 인쇄해 드릴까요? 먼 옛날의 방식이지만 나름대로의 멋이 있어요.

1000610909.english: - I tried to quickly delete all the pictures I took of the captain's room, but I couldn't even delete half of them before Feather took the panel away from me again.
1000610909.korean: - 서둘러 함장실을 찍은 사진을 모두 삭제하려 했지만 &n반도 못 지우고 페더에게 패널을 다시 빼앗기고 말았다.

1000610910.english: Aaaah no! I worked so hard to take this picture!

1000610911.english: Seriously. Commander, you're so mean. We need to take another picture.
1000610911.korean: 정말. 사령관님은 너무 짓궂으세요. 다시 찍어야 되잖아요.

1000610912.english: Well... I think it might be a good idea to go back to the beginning and start collecting again...
1000610912.korean: 뭐... 초심으로 돌아가서 다시 모으는 것도 나름 괜찮을 것 같기도...

1000610913.english: Hehe, hehehe... Commander? If you happen to be sleeping with Captain Khan, please let me know.
1000610913.korean: 후후, 후후후... 저기, 사령관님? 혹시 칸 대장님이랑 침실에 드실 땐 꼭 말씀을 해주세요.

1000610915.english: - My headache is getting worse. Is it my own pace, or is it just shamelessness?
1000610915.korean: - 두통이 더욱 심해진다. 마이페이스인 건지, 뻔뻔한 건지...

1000610917.english: - Talon Feather, who had been blushing and lost in her thoughts, instantly returned to her original form.
1000610917.korean: - 홍조를 띄우고 망상에 빠져있던 탈론페더는 순식간에 원래 모습으로 돌아왔다.

1000610918.english: - No, I don't know which one is the original.
1000610918.korean: - 아니, 애초에 어느쪽이 원래 모습인건지 모르겠다.

1000610919.english: - The transitions are so fast that it's hard to keep up.

1000610920.english: I'm going to use the secret network I've set up.

1000610921.english: You can sit here and see most of the interior of the Orca.
1000610921.korean: 여기 앉아서 오르카 내부 대부분을 살펴볼 수 있답니다.

1000610922.english: - As Feather manipulated the panel, numerous images appeared on the screen.
1000610922.korean: - 페더가 패널을 조작하자 화면에 수많은 영상이 떠올랐다.

1000610923.english: - Not only the captain's cabin and the bridge, but also some of the crew's quarters and even some secluded areas...
1000610923.korean: - 함장실과 함교는 물론이고, 대원들 숙소 중 일부, 그리고 으슥한 곳들까지...

1000610924.english: - My face feels hot. These are all places I remember. No, how did I know?
1000610924.korean: - 얼굴이 화끈거린다. 전부 기억에 남아있는 장소들이다. 아니, 대체 어떻게 안 거야?

1000610926.english: - Feather's eyes widen when she hears my words.
1000610926.korean: - 내 말을 들은 페더의 눈이 휘둥그레진다.

1000610928.english: - I was speechless at the reaction of the person who was the enemy.

1000610929.english: - Feather's face was filled with resentment and doubt. To a stranger, it would seem like I was abusing my power.
1000610929.korean: - 페더의 얼굴엔 억울함과 의문이 가득하다. 모르는 사람이 보면 내가 권력을 남용하는 것처럼 보일 지경이다.

1000610930.english: - Feather looked up at me with a face filled with despair and betrayal.
1000610930.korean: - 페더가 절망과 배신감이 뒤섞인 얼굴로 나를 올려다봤다.

1000610933.english: I will definitely find the answer! Just like I always have!
1000610933.korean: 반드시 답을 찾을 거예요! 지금까지 그래왔듯이!

1000610934.english: - There were some mishaps, but Feather's abilities were real.
1000610934.korean: - 약간의 해프닝이 있었지만 페더의 능력은 진짜였다.

1000610935.english: - Thanks to the secret network, we managed to get out of Orca without anyone noticing.
1000610935.korean: - 그... 시크릿 네트워크 덕분에 우리는 아무에게도 들키지 않고 오르카 밖으로 나오는 데 성공했다.

1000610936.english: - Near where the Orca was anchored, I grabbed the backpack the Doctor had prepared and set off for the city with a refreshed mind, but I wasn't able to make any progress.
1000610936.korean: - 오르카 호가 정박한 곳 근처에 어느새 닥터가 준비해둔 배낭을 챙기고&n산뜻한 마음으로 목표로 한 도시로 출발했지만 영 속도가 나지 않았다.

1000610938.english: - The exoskeleton/backpack that the Doctor had quickly created by modifying Silky's was comfortable. It also had a good center of gravity.
1000610938.korean: - 닥터가 실키의 것을 개조해서 뚝딱 만들어준 외골격 겸 배낭은 편안했다. 무게중심도 잘 잡혀있고.

1000610939.english: - The cold isn't a big problem, but the waist-high snow slows down your steps.
1000610939.korean: - 그것과 추위는 큰 문제가 되지 않지만 허리높이까지 쌓인 눈이 발걸음을 늦춘다.

1000610940.english: I wish I could hug you, Commander, and fly away, but I don't have enough horsepower to do that.
1000610940.korean: 제가 사령관님을 꼬옥 안고... 날아서 가면 좋겠는데, 그러기엔 출력이 부족해요.

1000610941.english: I'll contact the doctor. There must be some way...

1000610943.english: - I turn around at the sound of a familiar voice and see a huge gift box approaching.
1000610943.korean: - 익숙한 목소리에 뒤돌아보자 거대한 선물상자가 다가오고 있다.

1000610944.english: I'm glad you're not late. I brought a 'mount' for you, Master.
1000610944.korean: 늦지 않아서 다행이군요. 주인님을 위한 '탈것'을 가져왔어요.

1000610945.english: I didn't originally intend to use it for this purpose, but... it might help somehow.
1000610945.korean: 원래는 이런 용도로 사용하려 한 건 아니지만... 어떻게든 도움이 될 거예요.

1000610946.english: - The box Alexandra put down had a ribbon with a message celebrating the Winter Festival.
1000610946.korean: - 알렉산드라가 내려놓은 상자엔 겨울축제를 축하하는 문구와 함께 리본이 달려있다.

1000610948.english: - A ride? It looks like the doctor has prepared something else.
1000610948.korean: - 탈것이라니, 닥터가 또 뭔가 준비해준 모양이다.

1000610949.english: - Well, I don't think the doctor could have predicted that we would be stranded because of the snow.
1000610949.korean: - 하긴, 닥터가 우리가 눈 때문에 발이 묶인 걸 예상하지 못했을리는 없겠지.

1000610950.english: - Let's untie the ribbon and open the box...

1000610954.english: Hoe-eng, ho-ek, that's noisy. Now, hurry up and carry Master like you were taught.
1000610954.korean: 호에엥 호엑 시끄럽군요. 자, 어서 교육받은대로 주인님을 태우세요.

1000610955.english: Master, please... climb onto the 'mount' I trained you to ride.

1000610956.english: - Are you planning to call me a reindeer by putting on that headband?
1000610956.korean: - 혹시 저 머리띠 하나 달아놓고 순록이라고 우길 셈인가...?

1000610959.english: - Fotia came up next to me, who was startled and fell to the ground on the snowy ground.
1000610959.korean: - 놀라 엉덩방아를 찧은 내 옆으로 다가온 포티아가 눈 덮인 바닥에 엎드렸다.

1000610960.english: Come on. I can finally be of help to you, Master!
1000610960.korean: 어서요. 저, 드디어 주인님께 도움이 될 수 있어요!

1000610961.english: - She took Fotia's hand and helped her up.
1000610961.korean: - 엎드린 포티아의 손을 잡아 일으켜 세웠다.

1000610963.english: Well, I thought I could finally be of some help to you, Master...
1000610963.korean: 드, 드디어 주인님께 도움이 될 수 있다고 생각했는데...

1000610964.english: As expected... I'm a failure... useless...
1000610964.korean: 역시... 저는 실패작... 아무짝에도 쓸모 없는...

1000610966.english: Master, Fotia came to me of her own accord, saying she wanted to help you.
1000610966.korean: 주인님. 포티아는 주인님께 도움이 되고 싶다고 저에게 스스로 찾아왔어요.

1000610967.english: She received my 'education' without a single complaint... She was the most passionate student I'd seen in a long time.
1000610967.korean: 제 '교육'도 싫은소리 하나없이 받았고... 오랜만에 보는 열정적인 학생이었죠.

1000610969.english: Now, Fotia, let's get ready to carry our master again.
1000610969.korean: 자, 포티아. 다시 주인님을 태울 준비를 하도록 하죠.

1000610970.english: Wow, I definitely need to capture this in a photo. Let's see, with a burst shot...
1000610970.korean: 와아, 이건 꼭 사진으로 남겨야겠어요. 어디보자, 연속촬영으로...

1000610973.english: - I do need transportation right now, but... the idea is just too...
1000610973.korean: - 지금 이동수단이 필요한 건 맞지만... 발상이 너무...

1000610974.english: - While I was pressing my temples and trying to figure out a way to break the situation, a good idea came to me.
1000610974.korean: - 관자놀이를 꾹꾹 누르며 상황을 타개할 방법을 찾던 중, 좋은 생각이 떠올랐다.

1000610976.english: - Fotia rummaged through the gift box and took out the gauntlets.

1000610978.english: - Fotia's expression brightened in an instant after hearing what I said.
1000610978.korean: - 내말을 들은 포티아의 표정이 삽시간에 밝아졌다.

1000610980.english: - As Fotia went to melt the snow in excitement, Alexandra sighed in relief.
1000610980.korean: - 포티아가 신이나서 눈을 녹이러 가자, 알렉산드라가 보란듯이 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000610982.english: I wish you would show your manly side like you did back then...
1000610982.korean: 평소에도 그때처럼 남자다운 모습을 보여주시면 좋겠는데...

1000610983.english: Ah, my shutter chance flew away...

1000610984.english: Haa, haa. Master, this part is all done for now!
1000610984.korean: 하아, 하아. 주인님, 일단 요 앞은 다 됐어요!

1000610985.english: It's a bit far to the city, but... ha, I can do it!
1000610985.korean: 도시까지는 조금 멀지만... 하, 할 수 있어요!

1000610987.english: - She put down her backpack for a moment, took off her coat, and put it on Fotia.
1000610987.korean: - 배낭을 잠시 내려놓고 입고 있던 외투를 벗어서 포티아에게 걸쳐주었다.

1000610988.english: ...I thought I missed my chance, but I ended up taking a much better picture. Hehe.
1000610988.korean: ...기회를 놓친 줄 알았는데 훨씬 좋은 사진을 찍었네요. 후훗.

1000610989.english: Oh, Alexandra. Just hold on a second... That's enough.
1000610989.korean: 어머, 알렉산드라 님. 잠깐만 그대로... 됐어요.

1000610990.english: ...Why are you taking a picture of me?

1000610991.english: I think it's a good expression. It came out pretty. Would you like to check it out?
1000610991.korean: 좋은 표정인 것 같아서요. 예쁘게 나왔네요. 확인해보실래요?

1000610992.english: Okay, that's enough. Let's go too.

1000610993.english: Fotia isn't much help in battle, so if she encounters a worm, we have to deal with it.
1000610993.korean: 포티아는 전투엔 별 도움이 안되니까, 철충과 조우하면 우리가 처리해야 해요.

1000610996.english: - Fotia, exhausted from the wind that continued to melt the snow and advance, collapsed to the ground.
1000610996.korean: - 계속해서 눈을 녹이며 전진하는 바람에 녹초가 된 포티아가 바닥에 털썩 주저앉았다.

1000610997.english: Haa, haa, I arrived, I did...

1000610999.english: I heard briefly from the doctor...

1000611000.english: It certainly looks like a normal city on the outside.

1000611001.english: I think all the humans escaped before the Metal Parasite attacked.
1000611001.korean: 아마 철충들이 공격해 오기전에 인간님들이 전부 빠져나간 것 같아요.

1000611002.english: - The city appears to have suffered little damage other than the ravages of time.
1000611002.korean: - 도시는 시간에 의한 풍화를 제외하곤 별다른 피해를 입지 않은 것 같다.

1000611003.english: - At this point, I think I'll be able to find a lot of useful things, aside from gifts for the members...
1000611003.korean: - 이정도면 대원들을 위한 선물 말고도 이것저것 유용한 것들을 많이 찾아낼 수 있을 것 같은데...

1000611005.english: Yes, please leave it to me.

1000611006.english: - While waiting for Feather, I decided to look around.
1000611006.korean: - 페더를 기다리는 동안 주위를 둘러보기로 했다.

1000611007.english: - As I entered a nearby shop, a dusty smell wafted in.
1000611007.korean: - 근처에 있는 적당한 가게로 들어서자 먼지 냄새가 풍겨온다.

1000611008.english: - It was a jewelry store, and you can see some accessories left here and there in the broken display cases.
1000611008.korean: - 귀금속 가게였는지, 깨진 진열장 안에 드문드문 남아있는 악세서리들이 보인다.

1000611009.english: - I thought of the members and picked it up absentmindedly, then put it back in its place.
1000611009.korean: - 대원들을 떠올리고 무심코 집어들었다가 다시 제자리에 돌려놓았다.

1000611010.english: How about taking it as a gift?

1000611012.english: Since you are the last human, you have the right to take what the other humans left behind.
1000611012.korean: 주인님께선 마지막 인간님이시니, 다른 인간님들이 남긴 것을 취할 권리가 있어요.

1000611013.english: - Alexandra picked up the necklace I had put down.

1000611014.english: It's beautiful. Anyone would be delighted to receive something like this from their master.
1000611014.korean: 아름답네요. 주인님께 이런 걸 받으면 누구라도 기뻐하겠죠.

1000611016.english: - Alexandra put the necklace in my hand.

1000611018.english: When I heard it from the doctor, I thought it was a lie and was going to punish her.
1000611018.korean: 닥터에게 들었을 땐 거짓말인줄 알고 벌을 주려고 했어요.

1000611019.english: Haha, then there must be a lot to prepare.

1000611020.english: Fotia and I are also secretly in contact with the children who will help the Doctor.
1000611020.korean: 저랑 포티아도 그렇고, 닥터가 주인님을 도울 아이들과 은밀하게 접촉하고 있어요.

1000611021.english: It's a shame I can't enjoy the surprise party Master prepared...
1000611021.korean: 주인님이 준비한 깜짝 파티를 즐기지 못하는 건 아쉽지만...

1000611022.english: Still, I'm satisfied because I can help my master by his side.
1000611022.korean: 그래도 주인님을 곁에서 도울 수 있으니 만족해요.

1000611024.english: There's so much useful stuff. I wonder if I can take it all...
1000611024.korean: 쓸만한 게 정말 많아요. 이걸 다 가져갈 수 있을지...

1000611026.english: Ugh, where did Mr. Werewolf go...

1000611027.english: I finally managed to get some alcohol, but I have to drink it alone...

1000611028.english: Oh, hello. Yumi... was it you?
